# AI for project management

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/project-management?hl=en

# AI for project management

Discover how you can use Gemini to keep your team on track. Streamline communication, create task lists, build project timelines and more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_project_management-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_project_management-hero-en-GB)

![A person is in a Google Meet call. Around them, Gemini is taking notes from the call, drafting an email and creating a daily summary of unread emails.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/IjjM1M8Nmrk4dyNP0mojG-sGdRDbMfG8HCIIbO2pySmR0EXQ0949s8dwuvGvNIvkxHSwKvTs2d3hZPsCJXQSLUqO7xbVxxNiZUs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Automate tasks, gain insights and achieve more

![A Gemini prompt window for Google Sheets that reads 'Help me organise my project by listing tasks, assignees and due dates' and a Google Docs prompt that reads 'Help me write a project report'.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-cyv2bggl57JDaeylN_yjiF-zs4V4_UAVh25cqhmYsMuyz__3yXrEWuVDsQKOFhFL7GO6Xhjhu-8VY3PyRHfZZP0osMPni7DGEuD=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Simplify project tracking and data analysis with Gemini

Do your best work faster with AI built into the apps that you use every day. Go from a blank page to a project plan in moments with [Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/docs/ai/), helping you to draft proposals and align your team. Once the project kicks off, [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) makes it easy for you to create project plans, track budgets and analyse data.

## Drive project momentum with AI-powered meetings

Drive project momentum and stay fully engaged with [Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-meetings/). Stay focused during meetings with automated note-taking, instant in-meeting summaries and real-time speech translation for global teams. Ensure that everyone leaves the discussion aligned and ready to execute with [AI-generated notes](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking/) delivered directly to your inbox.

![A person is in a Google Meet video call with Gemini taking notes. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/U9WtdcWbV24svaoIDFxZMqxdbW0UPOiaiNdhwO6u3fgOZpTWTtrD4PA1GuQxr8xGNRcXrG_H5jH5omdfTKcUovFeYu9CVRmZ0KFKDQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![A prompt box that reads 'After a meeting, send action items to the team in Chat summarising next steps'. Next to it, a button reads 'Create with AI'.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/GTrvkH2AuKOkekWfCOwV7XpK0xdWkuJo9svTQ-4ZuJr-UUOX9f1-m445LSFdbBGoxqgYSYAmi-9ZD8_ToNK1UsshXvdRq64xFYtW=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Automate custom workflows with Workspace Studio

Streamline everyday tasks with AI-powered workflows â no coding required. [Workspace Studio](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/studio/) uses natural language prompts to build custom workflows. Leave a client call in Meet and get an instant recap in Docs sent to attendees via Gmail. Build flows in minutes with pre-configured steps.

## Power your project strategy with AI

![Document icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3ng1Mzrv9raB74u0TJKlAh-d8d13d3cf3f1297df078bba82e8e9057-Document.svg)

Turn documents into insights

Eliminate the manual effort of synthesising project data with [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/notebooklm/). Transform complex plans and transcripts into clear summaries with citations or instant Audio Overviews to keep stakeholders informed on the go.

![Table icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-6FVSrxmK0jUhJUnsU8UAsm-1bbded04c4c1e968b08ed7ee5dfbd04e-Table.svg)

Keep your team aligned

Have fewer meetings without losing touch. Create engaging updates that teams can view at any time. Share your message with [Google Vids](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/vids/) using AI-generated scripts, avatars and professional voiceovers.

![Communication icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-1MrQS8sI1J2BdiXM9fcH2s-ab4a4d89079788b6e73b96e86dac6668-Communication.svg)

Streamline communication

Quickly extract insights from lengthy email chains with [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/). Turn them into action item lists to keep projects on track.

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-22uVDjO6l6LZ2XyE5KvJJx-f37b5f564ae7f48e1a2519d03662b9d3-Gemini_Spark.svg)

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- AI helps project managers plan more effectively, automating repetitive tasks like reporting, generating project plans and task lists. This gives project managers more time to devote to strategic elements to drive projects forward.
- Gemini simplifies scheduling projects. Using historical data, Gemini can help you more accurately analyze project requirements, allocate resources, and create detailed timelines with milestones assigned to team members and stakeholders.
- No. Your private data is never used to train public AI models. Google Workspace and Gemini do not share any of your data outside your organization without your permission. Gemini Enterprise offers commercial data protection so that your proprietary data stays private. Your existing Workspace protections are automatically applied to any project data used in Gemini Enterprise.
- Workspace with Gemini and Gemini Enterprise can work with third-party project management tools via custom agents and integrations. This open ecosystem approach links intuitive Workspace tools your team already uses with project management-specific tools to streamline workflows. For example, you can build custom agents that track ticket status updates in Jira from Google Chat, pull prospect data from Salesforce into Google Sheets, or sync tasks from Asana.

# Document 22: AI for small business

Source URL: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-small-business?hl=en
Product area: workspace-site
Original file: docs/ai-for-small-business-44c73ea8.md

# AI for small business

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-small-business?hl=en

# AI for small business

Use AI to streamline your work, focus on important projects and save you time.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_for_small_business-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_for_small_business-hero-en-GB)

![Gemini generates a follow-up email, shown with woman on tablet](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/HafEWngwsxwJrSbmK3O2NK6lcPVz2W91sYDdDK5yZgtfI0CfEQ8EfoL9bl0PdElRiogZMUGooF8Rr7AqnNO8YsktzF01Hh28sFLU=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

### Unleash the power of AI for your small business

Generative AI is changing the way businesses of all sizes operate. Small businesses in particular can use AI to accelerate research, be more efficient, brainstorm new ideas, organise spreadsheets and more, so that you can focus on what matters most.

###### How is AI being used in small businesses?

For [small businesses](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/business/small-business/) and [start-ups](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/business/startups/), creativity is at the core. Finding inventive ways to use AI can help level the playing field for small businesses, giving you the tools to work faster. From helping you organise receipts, getting insights into how your business is performing or creating compelling blog posts, AI can help small businesses speed up workflows in smart, responsive ways.

### AI applications for your small business

More and more businesses are adopting AI-powered tools to help them work smarter. For small businesses, AI can help you maximise your resources. AI's capabilities can give small businesses more time to tackle important projects and streamline make-work.

[Learn how Gemini delivers AI solutions for small businesses.](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/)

###### Sales and marketing

Every business, no matter how big or small, needs to have a solid [sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/sales/) plan and [marketing](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/marketing/) strategy to generate profit. With limited time and resources, it can be difficult to keep a pulse on sales and marketing trends. Generative AI can aid sales and marketing efforts by helping to accelerate research and summarise lengthy information about audiences and markets. With your Workspace account you can use [Gemini](http://gemini.google.com) to help with research, create content and organise data so that you can find the time to craft great messaging. [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/presentation-ai/) can also help you with [presentations](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14196644?hl=en-GB), tailoring pitches to a specific customer. It can be tricky to know if your sales and marketing efforts are working, but you don't have to be a spreadsheet wizard to figure it out! With Gemini, you can uncover helpful insights without all the fuss.

###### Creative writing

For smaller teams with a long list of competing priorities, generative AI makes it easy to push past writer's block and quickly [create a first draft](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-writing/) or repurpose existing content into a different format. Gemini can help you create emails, branded materials, social media posts and a lot more, helping you save time. Use *Help me write* and include your company's brand voice, target audience and other relevant details to give [Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/docs/ai/) the information needed to create an initial draft. From there, review and apply your creative touches to get your message out into the world.

###### Customer service

Small businesses can set themselves apart from the competition with exceptional customer service. Generative AI can help automate and [personalise customer service](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/customer-service/) emails, craft timely responses and more. [Gemini in Sheets](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/spreadsheet-ai/) can help you organise customer information, helping inform communications with your customers and offering a personalised touch that makes those interactions more meaningful.

![Gemini creates a summary table from a prompt with 'Help me organise', shown with three people at a computer](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/d9iDM10MPwH892qyzEsbfQTzBl4kMVfcWNxhcGooTTGLO9zGXn735uZU45HTxGv_7Dgw06-eFYys6TJOAbtgiBpMJak-8rfUOhlB=e365-pa-nu-rw-w720)

###### Operational efficiency

Whether you're launching a new product or working on a new project, Gemini can help you stay on track. With *Help me organise*, Gemini in Sheets can help you build checklists, project trackers and more in just seconds. The collaborative nature of Google Workspace allows you to share these materials with your team and keep an eye on progress to keep things running smoothly.

###### Bookkeeping

Freelancers and small business owners like you have a lot to handle, and bookkeeping and logistics can be overwhelming. Gemini is your AI assistant that can help you organise and track receipts from your [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/ai/) inbox so that you don't have to waste time searching for critical information. AI does the heavy lifting for you by extracting essential details, organising summary notes in Docs and helping you create spreadsheets. Using Gemini with these kinds of insights can help get to answers â like 'where is the money spent' â that matter most to you and your business.

### How can AI help small businesses do more with less?

AI can help small businesses make the most of their resources, giving them the tools needed to easily create tables and trackers, create compelling first drafts of content and presentations and serve as a research partner. AI can help small businesses summarise customer communication and craft meaningful responses to enquiries and common questions.

These are only a few ways that small businesses can use the power of AI to do more with less. The more you work with AI, the easier it is to find even more ways to help streamline tasks, save time and find creative inspiration. AI is [changing the way that we work](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/3-ways-gen-ai-will-impact-way-we-work?hl=en-GB). To use AI successfully, small businesses need to learn how to write effective prompts that can help generate the most helpful output.

###### AI prompts for your small business

**Speaking with investors**

Let's say that you are a founder of a startup and your online business is gaining traction. You have always dreamed of opening a bricks-and-mortar shop, and now might be the perfect time. You want a thought partner to help you better understand the current landscape. You open [gemini.google.com](https://gemini.google.com/), and you type:

*I am the founder of a startup. I am considering opening a bricks-and-mortar shop. Conduct an analysis into the competitive landscape focusing on [focus area]. Provide the strengths and weaknesses of [key competitors] in this area, including their specific strategies, tactics and results. Identify actionable insights and recommendations for how [my company] can improve its approach and gain a competitive analysis.*

**Enable customer self-service**

Imagine that you own a small boutique and you get a lot of emails with questions about your return policy. Customer feedback has consistently said your guidelines are unclear. You open a Google Doc that states the return, refund and store credit policies. You prompt Gemini in Docs by selecting *Help me write*. You type:

*Summarise this content to write a clear and concise product return policy and outline five steps for customers to take in sequential order.*

### How can I start using AI for my small business?

Gemini can help small businesses make the most of their resources. Save time by tapping into Gemini to help automate repetitive tasks, giving you more time to do work that matters. Use Gemini in Sheets to create tracking tables and lists. Craft images and presentations with Gemini in Slides. Ask Gemini in Docs to help you create first drafts for different types of written materials, including emails and more. Gain your time back to focus on your craft with Gemini.

![A row of icons displaying Google Workspace products.](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3o5OAIAU0V4vxIn3lNLoiB-2c2568f4c76442271ff3a08e323ffbe3-6-Logo_Lockup_Recreated.optimized.svg)

# Document 24: “AI Mode” in Search Labs - Computer - Google Search Help

Source URL: https://support.google.com/websearch/answer/16296315
Product area: search-ai
Original file: docs/ai-mode-in-search-labs-computer-google-search-help-1f9fce94.md

# “AI Mode” in Search Labs — Google Search Help Summary

**Source:** https://support.google.com/websearch/answer/16296315  
**Scope:** Computer instructions for users opted into the **“AI Mode” experiment in Search Labs**.

---

## Key Excerpts & Important Notices

> **Important:** We’re currently updating settings for Google Search services, which include Search, Maps, Shopping, Flights, Hotels, Translate and News. The settings described in this article are being updated so may not match your current experience.

> **Important:** This Help Center article applies to users who have opted-in to the "AI Mode” experiment in Search Labs. If you don't find the Search Labs icon next to "AI Mode" you don't have this experiment turned on.

> To try even more generative AI capabilities in Search, opt into the “AI Mode” experiment in Search Labs, our testbed for innovation. This is an opt-in experiment to collect feedback on new capabilities before they are available on AI Mode in Search.

> **Tip:** AI responses may include mistakes.

> **Important:** “AI Mode” in Labs personalizes responses for users 18+ in the US who have Web and App Activity and Search personalization enabled.

---

## What AI Mode in Search Labs Is

**AI Mode** is an opt-in Search Labs experiment that lets users try additional generative AI capabilities in Google Search before they are broadly available in AI Mode.

Users can:

- Ask questions using **text or voice**
- Receive **AI-powered responses**
- Ask **follow-up questions**
- Continue prior interactions through **AI Mode history**
- Provide feedback to help Google improve the experiment

---

## Requirements

To use the **AI Mode** experiment in Search Labs, you need:

- To be **13 or older**
- A **personal Google Account** that you manage yourself
  - Search Labs and experiments are **not currently available** to:
    - Google Workspace accounts
    - Google Workspace for Education accounts
- Availability in a supported language
- For best experience:
  - Enable **Search history**
  - Enable **personalized recommendations**

Without history/personalization enabled, you can still access AI Mode, but:

- You **cannot pick up where you left off** with previous searches

---

## Supported Languages

AI Mode is available in the following languages:

| Column 1 | Column 2 |
|---|---|
| Arabic | Lithuanian |
| Bengali | Malayalam |
| Bulgarian | Marathi |
| Chinese (Simplified) | Malay |
| Chinese (Traditional) | Norwegian |
| Croatian | Persian (Farsi) |
| Czech | Polish |
| Danish | Portuguese (Brazil) |
| Dutch | Romanian |
| English | Russian |
| German | Serbian |
| Greek | Slovak |
| Finnish | Spanish |
| French | Swedish |
| Hebrew | Tamil |
| Hindi | Telugu |
| Hungarian | Thai |
| Indonesian | Turkish |
| Italian | Ukrainian |
| Japanese | Urdu |
| Kannada | Vietnamese |
| Korean |  |

---

## Search Personalization

AI Mode in Labs can personalize responses for:

- Users **18+**
- Located in the **United States**
- With **Web & App Activity** enabled
- With **Search personalization** enabled

### Manage Search Personalization

1. Go to the [Search personalization setting](https://www.google.com/search-personalization/?utm_source=google-account&hl=en&utm_medium=web&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/data-and-privacy).
2. Turn **Personalize Search** on or off.

---

## How to Get Started with AI Mode in Search Labs

1. On your computer, open any browser.
2. Make sure you’re signed in to your Google Account.
3. Turn **Incognito mode off**.
4. Enter a question in the Search bar on [Google](https://google.com/).
5. Click or tap **AI Mode** below the Search bar.
   - You can also go directly to [google.com/ai](https://google.com/ai).
6. Ask questions using text or voice.
7. Ask follow-up questions on the same topic.
8. Use **AI Mode history** to pick up where you left off.

---

## Agentic Capabilities for Google AI Pro / AI Ultra Subscribers

If you are a **Google AI Pro** or **Google AI Ultra** subscriber in the **US**, you may access the **“Agentic capabilities in AI Mode”** experiment.

This can help with tasks such as:

- Finding restaurant reservations
- Finding event tickets
- Booking beauty and wellness appointments

### Example Prompts

> Find me a dinner reservation for \[desired date, time, location, preferences, requirements, group size etc\]

> Find me 2 tickets to see \[artist in city\]. prefer seats with a good view that are still under $150 each

> Find me a good deal on a back massage in \[city\] on Sunday afternoon

---

## Turn AI Mode On or Off in Search Labs

1. On your computer, open any browser.
2. Make sure you’re signed in to your Google Account.
3. Open a new tab.
4. At the top of the page, click **Search Labs**.
5. Click **Manage**.
6. Toggle **AI Mode** on or off.

---

## Delete AI Mode History Saved in Your Account

### Delete a Specific AI Mode Search

1. On your computer, go to **AI Mode**.
2. On the left, click **AI Mode history**.
3. Find the AI Mode hist

[... summary truncated for context management ...]

---

# Document 25: AI note taking

Source URL: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking?hl=en
Product area: workspace-site
Original file: docs/ai-note-taking-07eb230e.md

# AI note taking

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/ai-note-taking?hl=en

# AI note taking

Save time and improve focus with AI note taking to capture, transcribe, and summarize information.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_ai_note_taking-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-ai_ai_note_taking-hero-en-CA)

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the "Take notes for me" feature summarizing the meeting. Below, a Gmail inbox shows the "Meeting Summary" email.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/We4LGS10ZYL6zqfAmXJ-5ZdD3RjKV3ylL6tZ8nLdW7GGr_awC2KQtBFQPsmseK7Yb5zIvUycBvbHQ1KhdsktkOcEac-N6n2uXyEl=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the "Summary so far" feature summarizing the meeting. To the right, a Google Doc shows the "Meeting Summary" notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ETMQlM9tUh45bQMSRFkP5yJTo7ZwpDUtF4ZrwliCj2mzMKunsTTPbbSwlr6jS9u-hucR60mFYtBXVoCBBk-yrg8FF08ouWoDSRRJ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Take notes for me

With "Take notes for me" in [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/meet/), you can focus entirely on the conversation while AI captures meeting details in real time. The feature organizes the notes in a [Google Doc](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/) and saves it directly to your [Drive](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/drive/), which frees you up to fully participate in the discussion. Try this and more in [Google Workspace with Gemini](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/).

## AI note taking in Google Workspace

![Gemini taking notes in a Google Meet call.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Q5lsM_sg7EDWNtTFMRzRF9NrbnCfgWMtQWoFQ7gIC6hJ2yhmSWqGOJSn09szsXXs8Vjgc9ZR3hbwuv10KMMIucWHXWFcC_Rj5yCS=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Meet

Gemini in Meet captures real-time notes and action items, so you can stay focused on the discussion.

![Gemini creating a Google Doc containing meeting notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CbGc--ufrPAegccJWYnR-_EN2VeRItFiVPAPGTtJkQvjSdWFENjsKc0i1FQHFU69_EeTEcFOsw6Zb_0GQritauErufKy3ANawcYuFQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Docs

Your meeting transcript and next steps are automatically organized in a Doc. You can then use [Gemini](http://gemini.google) to further refine and summarize your notes.

![Gemini attaching meeting notes to a Calendar event.  ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/dqlrjlbxCWLzEQ6kMuyYcojGB1fXMUuFoDaCmL64xTczQRfGkk2Wr4DY9vyuhf1vV3QXuL4F_5DaepcKIqo7QRHkzcyGst28HKK6Kw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Calendar

"Take notes for me" attaches the notes document to the Calendar event, giving internal invitees seamless access for efficient follow-up.

![Gemini taking notes in a Google Meet call.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Q5lsM_sg7EDWNtTFMRzRF9NrbnCfgWMtQWoFQ7gIC6hJ2yhmSWqGOJSn09szsXXs8Vjgc9ZR3hbwuv10KMMIucWHXWFcC_Rj5yCS=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Meet

Gemini in Meet captures real-time notes and action items, so you can stay focused on the discussion.

![Gemini creating a Google Doc containing meeting notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CbGc--ufrPAegccJWYnR-_EN2VeRItFiVPAPGTtJkQvjSdWFENjsKc0i1FQHFU69_EeTEcFOsw6Zb_0GQritauErufKy3ANawcYuFQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Docs

Your meeting transcript and next steps are automatically organized in a Doc. You can then use [Gemini](http://gemini.google) to further refine and summarize your notes.

![Gemini attaching meeting notes to a Calendar event.  ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/dqlrjlbxCWLzEQ6kMuyYcojGB1fXMUuFoDaCmL64xTczQRfGkk2Wr4DY9vyuhf1vV3QXuL4F_5DaepcKIqo7QRHkzcyGst28HKK6Kw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w738)

### Google Calendar

"Take notes for me" attaches the notes document to the Calendar event, giving internal invitees seamless access for efficient follow-up.

## Reclaim your focus

Using AI for note taking boosts productivity and reduces errors compared to manual note taking. âTake notes for meâ helps you stay focused and actively participate in meetings instead of capturing next steps and key points.

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the "Take notes for me" feature identifying action items and assigning tasks to attendees.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/8sdE_Lhc19nWRf6GZzt0PwwZSRW75nsuRLQOrqDa4A00mRAa-WfpRpBskWXnF21n575lLLonokpsuiWZqH6uoK1BX9GC-b17UVI=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Tips for smarter meeting notes

Get the best results from your AI meeting note taker by:

- Having clear audio and eliminating outside noise
- Prepare and follow an agenda for the meeting
- Reviewing and editing AI-generated notes for accuracy

## Frequently asked questions

Take a look at our FAQs to learn more.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini is trained using massive datasets of voice recordings in different languages, accents, and dialects. This makes it possible to identify language and speech patterns for accurate translation and note taking.
- Gemini in Google Meet offers AI-powered capabilities that can transcribe audio and video meetings in real-time and can offer translated captions in over 70 languages.
- Workspace with Gemini AI note taking can quickly pinpoint action items and key decisions discussed in a meeting. Ask Gemini to "Take notes for me" and Gemini analyzes the conversation and extracts major talking points, including suggested next steps and important decisions. Gemini then exports those takeaways to a Google Doc that can be shared with attendees.
- AI note taking saves time and allows attendees to fully focus on the conversation and participate instead of worrying about capturing every detail in writing. Whether youâre in a client meeting or lecture hall, AI note taking can accurately highlight important topics and information.

Using AI for note taking boosts productivity and reduces errors compared to manual note taking. âTake notes for meâ helps you stay focused and actively participate in meetings instead of capturing next steps and key points.

![A person speaking on a Google Meet call with the "Take notes for me" feature identifying action items and assigning tasks to attendees.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/8sdE_Lhc19nWRf6GZzt0PwwZSRW75nsuRLQOrqDa4A00mRAa-WfpRpBskWXnF21n575lLLonokpsuiWZqH6uoK1BX9GC-b17UVI=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

![A person on a video call, with "Microphone" settings showing and "Studio Sound" enabled. To the right, a "Summary" window generates notes.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NMYTjyReupoA0m6x-nLCUSsQ5FfTgCJwJl_jT2AINzccCWc7h9IJ8IJJygsrXCs15WfCnxjXyi0_d80SARKUY3K_HWLmUDywqH4y=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Tips for smarter meeting notes

Get the best results from your AI meeting note taker by:

- Having clear audio and eliminating outside noise
- Prepare and follow an agenda for the meeting
- Reviewing and editing AI-generated notes for accuracy

## Frequently asked questions

Take a look at our FAQs to learn more.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini is trained using massive datasets of voice recordings in different languages, accents, and dialects. This makes it possible to identify language and speech patterns for accurate translation and note taking.
- Gemini in Google Meet offers AI-powered capabilities that can transcribe audio and video meetings in real-time and can offer translated captions in over 70 languages.
- Workspace with Gemini AI note taking can quickly pinpoint action items and key decisions discussed in a meeting. Ask Gemini to "Take notes for me" and Gemini analyzes the conversation and extracts major talking points, including suggested next steps and important decisions. Gemini then exports those takeaways to a Google Doc that can be shared with attendees.
- AI note taking saves time and allows attendees to fully focus on the conversation and participate instead of worrying about capturing every detail in writing. Whether youâre in a client meeting or lecture hall, AI note taking can accurately highlight important topics and information.

![Gemini spark icon ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/QvpjjvfsNSOGRhwVxT5Yzb8GGHGvM8ofRFPQ7plqlsuMwUehmcfZcw7FISasCFHXWZxx9DkLKYABSSa6g2xQye-Uhv5zFzj216g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w128)

- Yes, each video can be a maximum of 10 minutes to maximize viewer engagement. If you need to insert a portion of a longer video, you can insert videos from your Drive (up to 30 minutes) into a scene and then trim them.

- Currently, Vids is available in the userâs local language, but the AI features (e.g. Help me create a video, read-along teleprompter)Â and templates are only available in English at this time.
- At this time, Vids creation and editing is only available on desktop, with viewing available on both desktop and mobile devices.

## Start creating videos, no experience required

Google Vids offers a variety of ways to jumpstart video creation and build your narrative in less time than you thought.

![Gemini in Vids helping team members create a video based on a Google Doc](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/nSBIuBUf4WsB861iFk5xTl-e5THtqCqX_X70ujVighIVVEN6NZAI94gGvEEcijAh9Gz3GgTbx-U1Al_76kQwct05gIMPjGVr_Go6=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

### Get to first draft, faster

Use Gemini in Vids to create an initial video storyboard with suggested scenes, stock media, background music and more, with only a prompt and a file from your [Drive](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/drive/).

![Gemini in Vids helping team members create a video based on a Google Doc](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/HJDdqjzDrawUDNNtyI-KQUf-KPxDx6zCq1_Uwcay28N1mosJjsdja0uCvjKv0DVhzJ1tKmUYMXU9YCSwLT2CXsnIXM2AMJdLEFOl=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

[Sign in](https://accounts.google.com/v3/signin/accountchooser?continue=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fvideos%2Fcreate%3Fusp%3Dmkt_vids%26flowEntry%3DAccountChooser%26flowName%3DGlifWebSignIn%26service%3Dwise%26dsh%3DS-1691634419%253A1748021760593059) to access Vids.
- You can access our always-on resources in the [Google Workspace Learning Center](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14817658?hl=en-CA&sjid=643692202113233967-NC) or watch our â[Vids on Vidsâ instructional series](https://goo.gle/3UPLuwR) on YouTube to learn what you can do with Google Vids.
- Yes, each video can be a maximum of 10 minutes to maximize viewer engagement. If you need to insert a portion of a longer video, you can insert videos from your Drive (up to 30 minutes) into a scene and then trim them.
- At this time, weâve optimized the initial experience for desktop, given that is where users most often create and view work videos and content today. Follow our [Google Workspace Updates blog](https://workspaceupdates.googleblog.com/) to stay up to date on new feature releases.
- Currently, Vids is available in the userâs local language, but the AI features (e.g. Help me create a video, read-along teleprompter)Â and templates are only available in English at this time.
- At this time, Vids creation and editing is only available on desktop, with viewing available on both desktop and mobile devices.

### Record with confidence

Record yourself, your screen or your audio and insert into your video in a few clicks. Stay on-message with our read-along teleprompter.

![A team member recording a video of themselves with their script prompted above](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/iB9juRj3f9vcKNHhivq6AbbZr1e20qQfSjSo2qkVDUuCNbfobNTFJQEku4zMpB5VrhEq09_xe7HB9yGJdXtzstrlRPyJV3vDFLE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Never start from scratch

Gemini in Vids provides suggested scripts per scene to help you get to your final cut faster.

![Gemini in Vids provides suggested scripts](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/loZ_ffI-JjA02JNwKk-1EhrPCVoe1ILH298uUE1gnlz4zDs1tqeFMinreSZNTNQqrFVDOVDgvVYhQW5ZC6wZ5ndX6V_s-fuUyCol=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

### Record your screen in a snap

Quickly record your screen and camera from any browser window using the new [Google Vids Screen Recorder Chrome extension](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/google-vids-screen-record/iklnnbgdcppplombffihcijanngoeifm?utm_source=vids-marketing-page).

![A browser window displays a 'Cymbal Sneaker 2.0' product detail page with a large shoe image, colour and size selectors and a small video overlay of a man explaining the page while an on-screen recorder runs.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/H48IYC6ol7_q77u9AHgrwrp7nHLOuj4umQH8wTLoDOgcu-WBC7i8MEmvcy9GB0ffvEdZ-7zkdN9OsooxWPDqLaDlvg52uBYadz70=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

![A team member recording a video of themselves with their script prompted above](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/f24gXKjRYkVVqs25371asIFobRPmomgNwz0XTbGnrq10F301ycm7_0mCy8Na1uY2wW-G38za-fnsZeHN64ElVO7sVpL6OUbUVnA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Gemini in Vids provides suggested scripts](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/u3zeelY6Y8CoJdFWeUGxt6WOOG-fFfSjXM_wpkVaU3o0GNJU3Neb_H-5odtKEVeg2ISLOXlO5dDn2vpY_Yu8m3zQ6SoIyJXd8DQW3w=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

## Transform your video storytelling with VeoÂ 3

Bring your ideas to life with [Veo](https://deepmind.google/models/veo/) in Vids. Use a [prompt](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/text-to-video/) or image to create stunning video clips with realistic motion and native audio, or get an AI avatar to present your message.

![Graphic showcasing 'Veo 3 in Google Vids' featuring its logo centred among four video thumbnails of people presenting in different settings](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/288QPEwUiOxViEqJZrSYdHA4Th3uFlX_7IgLxu2-qHb6DRjwnk70PAYL0oJkr0iEr4mggB6bC2Vl3o2nxediZwVhXYxjwTGBPlXH=e365-pa-nu-rw-w600)

## Generate video from a simple prompt

Skip the search for footage. Generate high-quality eight-second video clips from [a text prompt](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/beyond-prompt-question-your-way-better-prompting?hl=en-GB) in minutes.

## Deliver your message with AI avatars

Simply write a script and generate an AI avatar. It's a fast, consistent way to create polished video content â without the cameras or coordination.

![Google Vids UI displaying a video timeline and a right-hand side panel for generating a script for an AI avatar.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/9KE34xp2eTltmjurx5G_7jT6LnqEyJ91k1M1UFzk10Lxm2fN_DncaoRVBI_qKxRQsgyIbfXIXXTUEfmXxtLiI2FwoS3NOj7y1Dr2=e365-pa-nu-rw-w600)

## Animate your images with Veo

Make your photos move. Upload an image and watch your ideas come to life with native audio generation. It's perfect for making your product shots and brand creative more dynamic and engaging.

## Unleash your creativity with rich media

Easily insert visuals, music, transitions and more to better engage your viewers.

# Document 31: AI Text to Video Generator: Create Videos with Google Vids & Veo 3 | Google Workspace

Source URL: https://workspace.google.com/resources/text-to-video/
Product area: google-vids
Original file: docs/ai-text-to-video-generator-create-videos-with-google-vids-veo-3-google-workspace-c5154d01.md

# AI Text to Video Generator: Google Vids + Veo 3 — Summary

**Source:** https://workspace.google.com/resources/text-to-video/  
**Product:** Google Vids for Google Workspace  
**Core message:** Google Vids lets users generate high-quality AI video clips from text prompts or images using **Veo 3**, Google’s latest video generation model, directly inside the Google Workspace environment.

---

## Key Excerpts

> **“Turn your prompts into compelling, high-quality video clips with text-to-video AI generation.”**

> **“AI video generation with a simple prompt in Google Vids. Create AI video clips from text or image, with the option to add animations, voiceovers, music and more in a simple video editor.”**

> **“You can now generate video with Veo 3, Google’s latest state-of-the-art video generation model, without ever leaving Google Vids.”**

> **“Upload an image and watch your ideas come to life with native audio generation.”**

> **“Google Vids ‘Generate a video’ feature empowers you to create high-quality AI video clips. Experience high-definition video output with realistic motion and sound, with a wide range of visual styles.”**

> **“Veo 3 understands nuanced prompts and cinematic language (like "timelapse" or "aerial shot"), giving you finer creative control over the look and feel.”**

> **“Google Vids is helping teams across customer support, learning and development, project operations, marketing and sales to unlock video creation with AI - no special skills required.”**

> **“Create with confidence knowing your generated outputs are protected from copyright claims, your data is protected and never used to train our models.”**

---

## What Google Vids Offers

Google Vids is positioned as an AI-powered video creation tool for Workspace users. It enables teams to create video content quickly without specialized editing skills.

### Main capabilities

- Generate AI video clips from:
  - **Text prompts**
  - **Images**
- Use **Veo 3** inside Google Vids without leaving the app
- Add or edit:
  - Animations
  - Voiceovers
  - Music
  - Storyboards
  - Scripts
  - Scenes
- Produce high-definition video with:
  - Realistic motion
  - Sound
  - Native audio generation
  - Multiple visual styles
- Use cinematic prompt language such as:
  - `"timelapse"`
  - `"aerial shot"`

---

## Veo 3 Integration

Google Vids includes access to **Veo 3**, described as Google’s latest state-of-the-art video generation model.

### Veo 3 benefits

- Generates high-quality clips directly in Google Vids
- Supports both **text-to-video** and **image-to-video**
- Understands nuanced and cinematic prompts
- Offers greater creative control over visual style, motion, and composition
- Supports native audio generation for more dynamic outputs

The page links to more information about Veo 3 via Google DeepMind:  
[Veo 3](https://deepmind.google/models/veo/)

---

## Image-to-Video Use Case

Google highlights the ability to transform static images into videos.

### Suggested uses

- Making product shots more dynamic
- Enhancing brand creative
- Creating engaging visual assets from existing imagery
- Adding motion and sound to otherwise static content

---

## Benefits of AI Text-to-Video in Google Vids

Google emphasizes that users can begin creating engaging videos quickly and without extra licensing.

### Key benefits

- Fast generation of custom footage
- No special video production skills required
- Built-in AI assistance for ideation and drafting
- Workspace-native collaboration and sharing
- Copyright and data protections
- Suitable for business teams across multiple functions

---

## Gemini in Google Vids

Google Vids also integrates with **Gemini** to help users create an initial video structure.

### How it works

With a prompt and a Google Doc from Drive, Gemini can generate:

- Initial storyboard
- Suggested scenes
- Scripts
- Professional-sounding AI voiceovers
- Additional creative structure for the video

Relevant Workspace links:

- [Google Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/?from=gafb-text_to_video-def-en)
- [Google Drive](https://workspace.google.com/products/drive/?from=gafb-text_to_video-def-en)

---

## Workspace Integration

Google Vids is designed to work like other Workspace tools such as Docs and Slides.

### Collaboration features

- Create videos in a familiar Workspace-style interface
- Collaborate with teammates
- Share videos through:
  - Google Chat
  - Gmail
  - Other Workspace channels
- Use familiar sharing and access controls

---

## Security, Copyright, and Data Protection

Google stresses secure video creation for business users.

### Claims made on the page

- Generated outputs are protected from copyright claims via Google’s generative AI indemnity terms
- User data is protected
- User data is **not used to train Google’s models**

Important links:

- [Generative AI indemnified services](https://cloud.google.com/terms/generative-ai-indemnified-services)
- [Model training/data protect

[... summary truncated for context management ...]

## Enterprise-grade security and privacy

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5sFHiVaV3O3t9vceIOvQZ4-6f0ed393157e951bd09b9d02d735a760-Privacy.svg)

Privacy

Your data is your data, and itâs not used to train Gemini models or for ads targeting. You can delete your content or export it.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-KcahGqpvLLdwcFQS1UO4g-71569adedba92806d553173251cde509-Security.svg)

Security

Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to. You can restrict access to sensitive data with built-in DLP controls.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-17r73V7VNqV4R0d8ouMQsF-d7c648ef527f394f3fba1df7d6e596dc-Compliance.svg)

Compliance

Gemini has attained a comprehensive set of privacy and security certifications, such as ISOÂ 42001 and SOCÂ 1/2/3, and can help meet HIPAA compliance.

For more detailed information, please refer to the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-GB).

### Want to learn more?

Here are some answers to common questions about these features.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini weaves AI into apps that you use every day, like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat, Vids and more. It also provides powerful standalone tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM. [Explore](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805975-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en) which Workspace plan is right for your business. You can [try it now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805975-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en) at no cost.
- Follow the [Google Workspace blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/?hl=en-GB) to track the latest progress and developments.
- Your organisation's data in Workspace is your data, and it's not used to train or improve Gemini models or for ads targeting. Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to and does not share user prompts or generated responses with other users or organisations. You can restrict Gemini's access to sensitive data in Workspace with built-in data loss prevention (DLP), information rights management (IRM) and client-side encryption (CSE) controls. For more detailed information, please refer to the [Generative AI in Workspace Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-GB).
- The Gemini app is available in [more than 40 languages](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13575153?hl=en-GB). Gemini in the [side panel of Gmail, Docs, Sheets and Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/15146419?hl=en-GB) is available in [25 languages](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14925782?hl=en-GB). Gemini is available in all supported languages wherever Google Workspace is sold. We are actively working on making Gemini available in even more languages.
- [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/notebooklm/) is an AI research assistant, included in Google Workspace plans, that is grounded in the documents you provide. Upload your sources to instantly summarise complex information, discover hidden connections, generate engaging Audio Overviews and visually explore topics with mind maps and Video Overviews.
- Gemini Enterprise is an advanced agentic platform that brings the best of Google AI to every employee, for every workflow. It empowers teams to discover, create, share and run AI agents, from removing development bottlenecks to analysing sales data, all in one secure environment grounded in your company's data. Learn more about transforming your business with [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-faq&hl=en-GB).
- Google offers multiple ways to build apps with the Gemini API, quickly develop prompts and transform ideas into code. [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini?hl=en-GB).

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3rzrpr9DYRQH4Mg1yqP27O-e85e597871ca6e3c6db160dde2b58dd4-5050_UK_Gradient_Spark.svg)

\*Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization. Business Starter includes 30 GB pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2 TB, Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5 TB. Visit our Help Center to learn more about getting additional storage for your organization.

## Enterprise-grade security and privacy

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5sFHiVaV3O3t9vceIOvQZ4-6f0ed393157e951bd09b9d02d735a760-Privacy.svg)

Privacy

Your data is your data, and itâs not used to train Gemini models or for ads targeting. You can delete your content or export it.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-KcahGqpvLLdwcFQS1UO4g-71569adedba92806d553173251cde509-Security.svg)

Security

Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to. You can restrict access to sensitive data with built-in DLP controls.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-17r73V7VNqV4R0d8ouMQsF-d7c648ef527f394f3fba1df7d6e596dc-Compliance.svg)

Compliance

Gemini attained a comprehensive set of privacy and security certifications, such as ISO 42001, SOC 1/2/3 and can help meet HIPAA compliance.

For more detailed information, please refer to the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-CA).

## Google Workspace is more powerful with Gemini Enterprise

Gemini Enterprise lets your team run AI agents in one secure platform. With Google Workspace, agents can work across your apps so teams accomplish more, faster.

![A dark infographic with concentric blue rings mapping out an AI ecosystem. It labels central components like Gemini models as "The Brains" and agent orchestration as "The Workbench" around a central video play button.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YZZ8d6gNBVQWlNHXCJwbMfzvzraGrFuF_nhJSMkskq2uIzloqSv4AY4P5yFpSDrAiZjOr1ncVUhN32gkC634cLdOOqM7IxoFVNic=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Empower your teams with agents

Build custom agents and use them across Docs, Gmail, and more. No coding necessary.

Ground agents in your business data

Connect agents to your apps and systems of record, giving them the context to solve complex tasks.

Deploy and manage with confidence

Govern with enterprise-grade security and data sovereignty, for agentic teamwork without compromising control.

## Organizations are using Gemini to move faster and be more productive

![Uber logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/me1s20v6oi6MdhwXBNImQkS-2pkcDPTB8wgP3-qb7El2qJopvv_Bz7PocchJbTKLk7Gf3a2yDHZALCoqNpoQAz_Xg3io5Fj4blr7JA=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Workspace with Gemini helps us save time on repetitive tasks, frees up developers for higher-value work, reduces our agency spending, and enhances employee retention.

**Dara Khosrowshahi**, CEO Uber

![Deloitte](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NLUjEc7jRTXOYRdsa6WtJ46WpaNc2Qzy4F96UYUbXOOnnok1jn4tjfHB6brs_CLxJJ0bTjH8Psctol06wNSaxdiSkbxZlttB5O83TQ=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Gemini has been incredibly valuable for us as its differentiated capabilities have been core to making our everyday work more effective. Features such as Deep Research to develop in-depth analytical reports on topics, native multimodal understanding and NotebookLM for being able to derive insights from vast troves of information have changed our ways of working for the better.

**Gopal Srinivasan,** Principal

![Sports Basement logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/xK5TatN-dxhTdGRN9ZfE9mRQJHi9KFjNZW4A4s-u8ByJ8EblvSXvP-j2-V1wW8r3q0WigCSfeAh9svytC3JDIc8aUfSFvAfQfbY5=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Using Gemini with Workspace, the customer service team crafts customer responses nearly instantaneously. From there, they can personalize the emails to best suit a customerâs needs and their own voice. This has resulted in a 30-35% reduction in time spent drafting messages, resulting in quicker response time, better job satisfaction, and higher response quality. Weâve also shifted from using more than 100 templates for responses to simpler and faster prompting for more authentic responses.

**Anthony Biolatto**, CIO Sports Basement

![FinQuery logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/7H181VaXYH3dKaXDIPDwF5YJ-HSjX03OljVfkFV3g9IcP0VgvYZLOM8nfFBl9MgbvlTnOxGWnINAy8mGEDCDs3mJQwMTcr97n8ZT=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> Google Workspace with Gemini is becoming a part of our way of life. I personally leveraged Gemini in Google Docs to create a one-page summary of observability and monitoring tools. What Gemini gave me was CTO Ready. The time I get back from Gemini helps me spend more focus hours doing the things that really need my attention.

**Andrew Larson**, CTO FinQuery

![Pepperdine University logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/mOnnCN8ZekhWzlbXV2vx_8B3guRVhuNNg_zH9fj5Oj-wIYpOihU3OQRcgTX4md73OR85-uiFJjkql-n5Lfeeni7-1WCOhK8b2Q7x=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

> The captioning within Google Meet is going to be a huge game changer in extending equity and accessibility, especially for those with language barriersâ¦ Using Gemini with Google Workspace, we can now quickly transcribe meeting minutes within Google Docs and summarize them in a succinct way to share with our users.

**Jonathan See**, CIO Pepperdine University

![Trellix logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/bS9MREgb-q55Z4vEV_ICXAfgFsyW5GxPGVngQSymi6I016e1QMekl3_yTDa2g_HeQZQWLB0DM2SaNp3qCgD4lCOaI85EGB5-xQSL=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Now, with Gemini in Meet in preview, weâve been really impressed with how it can take meeting notes, from bulletizing to capturing action items.â¨I donât even need to make edits to what comes back in the Google Doc.

You can [try it now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805959-body-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en) at no cost.
- Follow the [Google Workspace blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/?hl=en-CA) to track the latest progress and developments!
- Your organizationâs data in Workspace is your data, and itâs not used to train or improve Gemini models or for ads targeting. Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to and does not share user prompts or generated responses with other users or organizations. You can restrict Geminiâs access to sensitive data in Workspace with built-in data loss prevention (DLP), information rights management (IRM), and client-side encryption (CSE) controls. For more detailed information, please refer to the [Generative AI in Workspace Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en-CA).
- The Gemini app is available in [more than 40 languages](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13575153?hl=en-CA). Gemini in the [side panel of Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/15146419?hl=en-CA) is available in [25 languages](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14925782?hl=en-CA). Gemini is available in all supported languages everywhere that Google Workspace is sold. We are actively working on making Gemini available for even more languages.
- [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/notebooklm/) is an AI research assistant, included in Google Workspace plans, that is grounded in the documents you provide. Upload your sources to instantly summarize complex information, discover hidden connections, generate engaging Audio Overviews, and visually explore topics with Mind Maps and Video Overviews.
- Gemini Enterprise is an advanced agentic platform that brings the best of Google AI to every employee, for every workflow. It empowers teams to discover, create, share, and run AI agents, from removing development bottlenecks to analyzing sales data, all in one secure environment grounded in your company's data. Learn more about transforming your business with [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-faq&hl=en-CA).
- Google offers multiple ways to build apps with the Gemini API, quickly develop prompts, and transform ideas into code. [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini?hl=en-CA).

![Gemini spark icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3rzrpr9DYRQH4Mg1yqP27O-e85e597871ca6e3c6db160dde2b58dd4-5050_UK_Gradient_Spark.svg)

## Enterprise-grade security and privacy

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-5sFHiVaV3O3t9vceIOvQZ4-6f0ed393157e951bd09b9d02d735a760-Privacy.svg)

Privacy

Your data is your data, and itâs not used to train Gemini models or for ads targeting. You can delete your content or export it.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-KcahGqpvLLdwcFQS1UO4g-71569adedba92806d553173251cde509-Security.svg)

Security

Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to. You can restrict access to sensitive data with built-in DLP controls.

![](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-17r73V7VNqV4R0d8ouMQsF-d7c648ef527f394f3fba1df7d6e596dc-Compliance.svg)

Compliance

Gemini attained a comprehensive set of privacy and security certifications, such as ISO 42001, SOC 1/2/3 and can help meet HIPAA compliance.

For more detailed information, please refer to the [Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919).

## Google Workspace is more powerful with Gemini Enterprise

Gemini Enterprise lets your team run AI agents in one secure platform. With Google Workspace, agents can work across your apps so teams accomplish more, faster.

![A dark infographic with concentric blue rings mapping out an AI ecosystem. It labels central components like Gemini models as "The Brains" and agent orchestration as "The Workbench" around a central video play button.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/YZZ8d6gNBVQWlNHXCJwbMfzvzraGrFuF_nhJSMkskq2uIzloqSv4AY4P5yFpSDrAiZjOr1ncVUhN32gkC634cLdOOqM7IxoFVNic=e365-pa-nu-s0-rw)

Empower your teams with agents

Build custom agents and use them across Docs, Gmail, and more. No coding necessary.

Ground agents in your business data

Connect agents to your apps and systems of record, giving them the context to solve complex tasks.

Deploy and manage with confidence

Govern with enterprise-grade security and data sovereignty, for agentic teamwork without compromising control.

Expand all

- Google Workspace with Gemini weaves AI into apps you use every day like Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Meet, Chat, Vids, and more. It also provides powerful standalone tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM. [Explore](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805955-body-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en) which Workspace plan is right for your business. You can [try it now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-alpha_ai_6805955-body-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en) at no cost.
- Follow the [Google Workspace blog](https://workspace.google.com/blog/) to track the latest progress and developments!
- Your organizationâs data in Workspace is your data, and itâs not used to train or improve Gemini models or for ads targeting. Gemini only retrieves relevant content in Workspace that the user has access to and does not share user prompts or generated responses with other users or organizations. You can restrict Geminiâs access to sensitive data in Workspace with built-in data loss prevention (DLP), information rights management (IRM), and client-side encryption (CSE) controls. For more detailed information, please refer to the [Generative AI in Workspace Privacy Hub](https://support.google.com/a/answer/15706919?hl=en).
- The Gemini app is available in [more than 40 languages](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13575153). Gemini in the [side panel of Gmail, Docs, Sheets, and Drive](https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/15146419) is available in [25 languages](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14925782?hl=en). Gemini is available in all supported languages everywhere that Google Workspace is sold. We are actively working on making Gemini available for even more languages.
- [NotebookLM](https://workspace.google.com/products/notebooklm/) is an AI research assistant, included in Google Workspace plans, that is grounded in the documents you provide. Upload your sources to instantly summarize complex information, discover hidden connections, generate engaging Audio Overviews, and visually explore topics with Mind Maps and Video Overviews.
- Gemini Enterprise is an advanced agentic platform that brings the best of Google AI to every employee, for every workflow. It empowers teams to discover, create, share, and run AI agents, from removing development bottlenecks to analyzing sales data, all in one secure environment grounded in your company's data. Learn more about transforming your business with [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?utm_source=wgc&utm_medium=et&utm_campaign=fy25-q4-solutions-ai-page-refresh&utm_term=-&utm_content=gemini-enterprise-cta-faq).
- Google offers multiple ways to build apps with the Gemini API, quickly develop prompts, and transform ideas into code. [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini).

# Document 35: AI tools for writing

Original file: docs/ai-tools-for-writing-701b115c.md

# AI tools for writing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-writing?hl=en

# AI tools for writing

With Gemini, you can harness the power of AI to help brainstorm, write, and edit high-quality content quickly and effortlessly.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/contact/?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en-CA)

![A âHelp me writeâ icon surrounded by examples of the feature in action. These include writing an acceptance letter in Gmail, drafting a memo in Google Docs, setting up a workflow in Workspace Studio, and creating a presentation template in Gemini.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/WYWFikEksoLYKVghaa-ajOfTzA1ghkDBBJzKlJvy4-160tsUg1bx-CRCZnm1qWVNh3vVad0tTu_KxahWu2Dt-2GWLqKoYZRnuis=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How are AI writing tools being used?

###### AI tools for writing leverage large language models to help people create content faster. [Gemini](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini-for-work?hl=en-CA) is an AI-powered assistant that can help with writing by assisting with tasks like researching, drafting copy, and polishing content.

Even the most talented writers sometimes have a difficult time coming up with ideas on-demand. Generative AI can help you push past the blank page by providing you with a springboard to build on. Whether you need help composing an email reply, get options for headlines, or target a specific audience segment with messaging for an ad campaign, generative AI can help you quickly deliver a first draft. Let Gemini help generate content quickly with [Gemini in Google Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/ai/), or use the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google.com) as your writing assistant by asking it to create content.

![A Google Doc with text highlighted and a âSummarizeâ window floating over the document.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AoK7KhUXOGFiSiiFkKzcKQxaJh-sF22yCfpcXR_WzbuPAMp_QVpdr_VEUcO6zzdoF51--STcyz1rsOKksesZQCNlZ_euYk1HGZju=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Let Gemini be your writing assistant

### Generate long-form content

Long-form content has the power to inform, entertain, and educate. But sometimes it can be difficult to organize your thoughts into a well-structured article that captures your audienceâs attention and expresses ideas clearly. When deadlines loom, Gemini acts as your AI-powered thought partner to help synthesize data and transform it into a polished first draft. Add your sources to Gemini or open Gemini in Google Docs to quickly create long-form copy grounded in trusted information.

For writers who like to take more of a hands-on approach, Gemini in Docs can help from directly within your active working-document. Let Gemini brainstorm with you by creating comprehensive outlines and initial drafts from scratch. With a first draft firmly in place, you can add your own creative touches to adjust the article and tailor it to your voice.

### Maintain your unique brand voice & style

Your brand voice and tone set you apart. Gemini helps you stay true to that voice. With [Google Workspace AI](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-for-small-business/) tools, you can create timely content without compromising your brand identity and build your own custom AI brand expert that never goes off-script. With [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise?hl=en-CA), you can share Gems across your organization and ensure that every team member can work from the same playbook, regardless of department or role.

Add custom instructions, upload your brand book, style guide, and persona docs directly from Drive to ground Gemini in your unique voice. Any proprietary data you use in Gemini stays secure and is never used to train generative AI models.

### Edit existing text

When you need an extra set of eyes on your content before publishing, AI writing tools can make suggestions to improve your writing. As a writing coach and editor, Gemini can help you save time on revisions by suggesting corrections for spelling and grammatical errors.

[Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/ai/) can also help you rewrite your article. Simply use Help me write in Docs and choose an option such as summarize or shorten to help you deliver a more concise draft. When writing ad copy, Gemini can also help you come up with multiple versions of text youâve already written, giving you more options to choose from.

### Create article outlines and research briefs

AI writing tools can help create outlines to better structure a piece of content, organize your thoughts, and deliver a focused narrative. Use Gemini to generate comprehensive research briefs with outlines of key points to guide long-form content such as articles or blog posts.

To use AI to generate a writing outline, start by asking Gemini for a structured outline befitting your specific type of content. Provide detailed information about your topic, any subtopics your article should include, and relevant keywords. Be sure to reference and attach critical documents or resources that Gemini should reference in its decision-making.

### Generate Gmail responses

Achieve the elusive Inbox Zero status and get help responding to emails without struggling to find the right words. [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/ai/) acts as a communication partner, crafting replies by building off of context in previous emails and relevant Drive files to create a response that continues to propel the conversation forward. Ask Gemini to help you adjust your tone, giving your email a more formal or relaxed feel. Gemini can also help you draft more concise emails, synthesizing information to deliver a shorter, easier-to-read message.

### Summarize complex information

Gemini makes it easy to pull insights from multiple sources right from the side panel in apps your team already uses. Synthesize key points from relevant folders in Drive, files in [Docs](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/docs/), or [Google Chat](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/chat/) and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/) threads. Transform raw data into a concise executive brief or a research-backed first draft. Use Gemini for smart summaries to take complex information and distill it into easily digestible content.

### Create business proposals

AI writing tools can also help you create business proposals and tailor your pitch to a prospect. Using Help me write, simply provide the details about your prospect and their industry. In seconds, Gemini in Docs can generate a proposal that outlines your services, offerings, and can even add a call invite to help you keep the conversation going. When the time comes to present to a prospect, [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/presentation-ai/) can help you create an outline and slides for a proposal deck that elaborates on your offerings. Gemini can also be used to generate speaker notes, helping you stay focused during your presentation.

![A Google Doc with a âRefineâ button floating over the text. On the left, a chat window shows a user asking, âWhat is our brand voice?â and NotebookLM retrieving a PDF of âBrand guidelinesâ. On the right, Gemini is brainstorming a list of ideas.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/B2axTOalWwpMwCW49nJfiTF0rOab6UMAC5SJm6fs4qWKl8_xxlceLT5WRJFlDlvXdT_OZK4qJmI85AhyciXgqu8mBob4oUoohRWoVQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Benefits of using an AI content writer

### Save time on repetitive tasks

With only so many hours in a day, it can be daunting to keep pace with a flood of emails, meetings, and tasks to accomplish. Gemini and [Google Workspace Studio](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/studio/) streamline routine writing tasks, giving you more time to focus on deep work. Workspace Studio helps you create automated workflows in Workspace apps in minutes without code. Quickly recap weekly meetings, capture action items, and connect Workspace with third-party apps to generate contextually aware drafts.

### Overcome creative barriers

Sometimes, you need a boost of inspiration. Thatâs where Gemini comes in. Gemini can be a creative partner that helps you overcome writerâs block. You can also use Gemini in Docs to refine your content, adjusting the tone and voice to be more formal or more playful, depending on your approach. Still stuck? Gemini can help you break through creative blocks by serving you with a list of ideas to spark your imagination and get those creative juices flowing again.

### Streamline formatting and structural editing

Transform messy first drafts into polished, professional content. Gemini uses advanced [AI and machine learning](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/?hl=en-CA) to refine content based on formatting guidelines and writing best practices. Gemini can save time on writing and editing, reordering sections for clarity and ensuring a clean hierarchy thatâs easy for both readers and Google AI Overviews to follow. [Workspace AI solutions](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/solutions/ai/) like NotebookLM can help you organize trusted sources and brand-specific data, ensuring your content references only sources you provide.

### Enhance teamwork and collaboration

Whether youâre a team of one or a team of many spread across different time zones, Gemini can help make the collaborative process more inclusive and seamless. During video conference calls with the entire team [Gemini in Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/ai-for-meetings/) can automatically take notes during the meeting and share with participants afterwards.

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Use built-in prompts like *Help me write* and *Help me organize*, adding your own context and details to help shape Gemini's output.

  [Learn more](https://cloud.google.com/duet-ai/docs/discover/write-prompts?hl=en-CA)
- Gemini can help you craft a variety of content, including emails, business proposals, presentations, outlines, blog posts, and more.
- Gemini collects data based on information you provide and maintains data privacy. Your data is never used to train generative AI models. Proprietary information stays private. Access is granted only to users in your organization with role or user-based permissions.

  [Learn more](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961?hl=en-CA).

# Document 36: AI tools for writing

Source URL: https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing?hl=en
Product area: workspace-site
Original file: docs/ai-tools-for-writing-9e4efe4d.md

# AI tools for writing

Source: https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-writing?hl=en

# AI tools for writing

With Gemini, you can harness the power of AI to help brainstorm, write, and edit high-quality content quickly and effortlessly.

[Get started](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/contact/?source=gafb-ai_writing-hero-en)

![A âHelp me writeâ icon surrounded by examples of the feature in action. These include writing an acceptance letter in Gmail, drafting a memo in Google Docs, setting up a workflow in Workspace Studio, and creating a presentation template in Gemini.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/WYWFikEksoLYKVghaa-ajOfTzA1ghkDBBJzKlJvy4-160tsUg1bx-CRCZnm1qWVNh3vVad0tTu_KxahWu2Dt-2GWLqKoYZRnuis=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## How are AI writing tools being used?

###### AI tools for writing leverage large language models to help people create content faster. [Gemini](https://cloud.google.com/ai/gemini-for-work) is an AI-powered assistant that can help with writing by assisting with tasks like researching, drafting copy, and polishing content.

Even the most talented writers sometimes have a difficult time coming up with ideas on-demand. Generative AI can help you push past the blank page by providing you with a springboard to build on. Whether you need help composing an email reply, get options for headlines, or target a specific audience segment with messaging for an ad campaign, generative AI can help you quickly deliver a first draft. Let Gemini help generate content quickly with [Gemini in Google Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/ai/), or use the [Gemini app](https://gemini.google.com) as your writing assistant by asking it to create content.

![A Google Doc with text highlighted and a âSummarizeâ window floating over the document.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AoK7KhUXOGFiSiiFkKzcKQxaJh-sF22yCfpcXR_WzbuPAMp_QVpdr_VEUcO6zzdoF51--STcyz1rsOKksesZQCNlZ_euYk1HGZju=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Let Gemini be your writing assistant

### Generate long-form content

Long-form content has the power to inform, entertain, and educate. But sometimes it can be difficult to organize your thoughts into a well-structured article that captures your audienceâs attention and expresses ideas clearly. When deadlines loom, Gemini acts as your AI-powered thought partner to help synthesize data and transform it into a polished first draft. Add your sources to Gemini or open Gemini in Google Docs to quickly create long-form copy grounded in trusted information.

For writers who like to take more of a hands-on approach, Gemini in Docs can help from directly within your active working-document. Let Gemini brainstorm with you by creating comprehensive outlines and initial drafts from scratch. With a first draft firmly in place, you can add your own creative touches to adjust the article and tailor it to your voice.

### Maintain your unique brand voice & style

Your brand voice and tone set you apart. Gemini helps you stay true to that voice. With [Google Workspace AI](https://workspace.google.com/resources/ai-for-small-business/) tools, you can create timely content without compromising your brand identity and build your own custom AI brand expert that never goes off-script. With [Gemini Enterprise](https://cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise), you can share Gems across your organization and ensure that every team member can work from the same playbook, regardless of department or role.

Add custom instructions, upload your brand book, style guide, and persona docs directly from Drive to ground Gemini in your unique voice. Any proprietary data you use in Gemini stays secure and is never used to train generative AI models.

### Edit existing text

When you need an extra set of eyes on your content before publishing, AI writing tools can make suggestions to improve your writing. As a writing coach and editor, Gemini can help you save time on revisions by suggesting corrections for spelling and grammatical errors.

[Gemini in Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/ai/) can also help you rewrite your article. Simply use Help me write in Docs and choose an option such as summarize or shorten to help you deliver a more concise draft. When writing ad copy, Gemini can also help you come up with multiple versions of text youâve already written, giving you more options to choose from.

### Create article outlines and research briefs

AI writing tools can help create outlines to better structure a piece of content, organize your thoughts, and deliver a focused narrative. Use Gemini to generate comprehensive research briefs with outlines of key points to guide long-form content such as articles or blog posts.

To use AI to generate a writing outline, start by asking Gemini for a structured outline befitting your specific type of content. Provide detailed information about your topic, any subtopics your article should include, and relevant keywords. Be sure to reference and attach critical documents or resources that Gemini should reference in its decision-making.

### Generate Gmail responses

Achieve the elusive Inbox Zero status and get help responding to emails without struggling to find the right words. [Gemini in Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/ai/) acts as a communication partner, crafting replies by building off of context in previous emails and relevant Drive files to create a response that continues to propel the conversation forward. Ask Gemini to help you adjust your tone, giving your email a more formal or relaxed feel. Gemini can also help you draft more concise emails, synthesizing information to deliver a shorter, easier-to-read message.

### Summarize complex information

Gemini makes it easy to pull insights from multiple sources right from the side panel in apps your team already uses. Synthesize key points from relevant folders in Drive, files in [Docs](https://workspace.google.com/products/docs/), or [Google Chat](https://workspace.google.com/products/chat/) and [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/products/gmail/) threads. Transform raw data into a concise executive brief or a research-backed first draft. Use Gemini for smart summaries to take complex information and distill it into easily digestible content.

### Create business proposals

AI writing tools can also help you create business proposals and tailor your pitch to a prospect. Using Help me write, simply provide the details about your prospect and their industry. In seconds, Gemini in Docs can generate a proposal that outlines your services, offerings, and can even add a call invite to help you keep the conversation going. When the time comes to present to a prospect, [Gemini in Slides](https://workspace.google.com/resources/presentation-ai/) can help you create an outline and slides for a proposal deck that elaborates on your offerings. Gemini can also be used to generate speaker notes, helping you stay focused during your presentation.

![A Google Doc with a âRefineâ button floating over the text. On the left, a chat window shows a user asking, âWhat is our brand voice?â and NotebookLM retrieving a PDF of âBrand guidelinesâ. On the right, Gemini is brainstorming a list of ideas.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/B2axTOalWwpMwCW49nJfiTF0rOab6UMAC5SJm6fs4qWKl8_xxlceLT5WRJFlDlvXdT_OZK4qJmI85AhyciXgqu8mBob4oUoohRWoVQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Benefits of using an AI content writer

With only so many hours in a day, it can be daunting to keep pace with a flood of emails, meetings, and tasks to accomplish.
