# Document 160: Gemini AI features now included in Google Workspace subscriptions  |  Generative AI  |  Google Workspace Help

Source URL: https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/generative-ai/workspace-with-gemini/gemini-ai-features-now-included-in-google-workspace-subscriptions
Product area: admin-console
Original file: docs/gemini-ai-features-now-included-in-google-workspace-subscriptions-generative-ai-google-wor-9357d995.md

# Gemini AI Features Now Included in Google Workspace Subscriptions

## Overview
Beginning in **January 2025**, Google started integrating new AI features directly into **Google Workspace Business and Enterprise editions**. These capabilities were previously exclusive to paid Gemini add‑ons. As part of this transition, several legacy add‑ons are no longer sold.

> **Key excerpt:**  
> “In January 2025 we started adding new AI features designed to improve productivity and innovation in organizations with Google Workspace Business and Enterprise editions.”

## Discontinued Add‑ons
The following are **no longer available for purchase**:

- Gemini Business–Legacy  
- Gemini Enterprise–Legacy  
- AI Meetings and Messaging  
- AI Security  

**Education exception:** The **Google AI Pro for Education** add‑on (formerly Gemini Education and Gemini Education Premium) **remains available** for educational organizations.

---

## AI Features Being Added
The features your organization receives depend on the Workspace edition. Highlights include:

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Gemini in the side panel** | AI assistance directly in Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive, and Chat. |
| **Help me write** | Quickly compose professional emails and documents in Gmail and Docs. |
| **Take notes for me** | Automatically capture meeting notes in Google Meet. |
| **Gemini app (gemini.google.com)** | Chat with next‑gen AI for learning, brainstorming, and planning. Use **Gems** to create a team of AI experts for repeatable tasks, coding, deep research, and data analysis. |
| **NotebookLM** | Upload sources to get instant insights and podcast‑style **Audio Overviews**. Enhanced version includes notebook customisation, advanced sharing, usage analytics, and higher limits for overviews, queries, notebooks, and sources. |
| **Gemini in AppSheet** | • **Gemini for App Creation** – build apps by describing a process in natural language.<br>• **Gemini in AppSheet Solutions** – add AI tasks in automations to extract and categorise information from images and documents. |

For complete feature lists by edition:
- [Business editions](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/getting-started/editions/compare-business-editions#gemini)
- [Enterprise editions](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/getting-started/editions/compare-enterprise-editions#gemini)

---

## Control & Management Options
Admins and end users have multiple ways to adjust AI settings:

### Admin Controls
- **Manage Gemini features in Workspace services** – Enterprise editions only.
- **Gemini app (gemini.google.com)** – can be turned on/off (does not affect other AI features in Workspace services).
- **NotebookLM** – turn on/off as an [additional service](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/users/advanced/turn-on-or-off-additional-google-services).
- **Google Vids** – [turn access on or off](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/users/access/turn-vids-on-or-off-for-users).
- **AI note‑taking in Meet** – control if users can [let Google AI take notes](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/meet/let-google-meet-ai-take-notes-for-my-users).
- **Smart features** – turn [Google Workspace smart features](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/security/manage-google-workspace-smart-features-for-your-users) on/off.
- **Gemini in AppSheet** – separately toggle [Gemini for App Creation](https://support.google.com/appsheet/answer/11918568#gemini-for-app-creation) and [Gemini in AppSheet Solutions](https://support.google.com/appsheet/answer/16106849).
- **Workspace Studio** – [turn on/off](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/users/access/turn-google-workspace-studio-on-or-off-for-your-organization) or block Gemini access via [API controls](https://knowledge.workspace.google.com/admin/studio/manage-access-to-steps-and-starters-in-workspace-studio#service).

### End‑User Controls
- Users can [manage smart features in Google products](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/10079371).

> **Automated protections:**  
> “Your existing Google Workspace data protections are automatically applied to AI features.”

---

## Privacy & Data Protections
Google emphasizes that generative AI **does not alter** its foundational privacy commitments.

> **Key privacy statements:**
> - *“Your interactions with Gemini stay within your organization. Gemini does not share your content outside your organization without your permission.”*
> - *“Your existing Google Workspace protections are automatically applied. Gemini brings the same enterprise‑grade security as the rest of Google Workspace.”*
> - *“Your content is not used for any other customers. Your content is not human reviewed or used for Generative AI model training outside your domain without permission.”*

This means data handling remains consistent with the broader [Google Workspace privacy commitments](https://cloud.google.com/privacy).

---

**Last updated:** 2026-06-11 UTC

---

# Document 162: Gemini features in Photos privacy hub - Google Photos Help

Source URL: https://support.google.com/photos/answer/15344015
Product area: photos-ai
Original file: docs/gemini-features-in-photos-privacy-hub-google-photos-help-dae93081.md

# Gemini Features in Photos Privacy Hub — Summary

**Source:** Google Photos Help  
**Last updated:** **February 18, 2026** — Updated the “What happens when I connect Google Photos to other Google services” section.

---

## Key Privacy Commitments

Google states the following core privacy protections for Gemini features in Google Photos:

> - Your personal data in Google Photos is never used for ads.  
> - Responses aren't reviewed by humans, unless you give feedback, or to address abuse or harm (this is rare).  
> - We don't train any generative AI models outside of Google Photos with your personal data in Google Photos.

**Important caveat:** These protections apply to Gemini features **within Google Photos**. If you share content with or connect Photos to another Google or third-party service, that other service’s own policies and controls may apply.

---

## What Are Gemini Features in Photos?

Gemini features in Photos are Google Photos features that use Google’s Gemini models to make Photos “smarter and more helpful.”

They include:

- **Ask Photos**
- **AI-powered title suggestions**

These features are covered by both:

- Google’s general **Privacy Policy**
- This specific **Gemini features in Photos privacy notice**

---

## What Data Is Collected & Used

Gemini features in Photos use information you have provided to Google, including:

- Photos and videos stored in your Google Photos library
- Face group labels and names
- Information in your Google Account
- Relationship information you provide for face groups
- Facts saved to your **Remember List**

Google may also process photos and videos to:

- Improve edits
- Make inferences
- Generate insights related to your life

Examples of inferences include:

- Estimated age of top face groups
- Locations associated with top face groups
- Insights related to people, places, and events in your life

Google Photos may use these inferences and insights to provide:

- Customized memories
- Edits
- Creations
- Ask Photos responses

---

## Face Groups, Labels, Names & Relationships

Adding names and relationships to face groups can improve Google Photos features, especially Ask Photos.

Benefits include:

- More helpful Ask Photos responses
- More accurate answers
- Better personalization

Users can manage, view, and delete:

- Face group labels
- Face group names
- Relationship information

---

## Remember List

The **Remember List** lets you save facts for Google Photos to remember and use later.

How it works:

- You can state facts directly in an Ask Photos conversation.
- Ask Photos will confirm it will remember the fact.
- You will have the option to undo the action.
- Saved facts can be viewed from the **“Gemini features in Photos”** setting.
- Each saved fact is shown in the Remember List.
- You can review and delete any saved fact.

---

## Advertising

Google states clearly:

> Your personal data in Photos is never used for ads.

This also applies to Ask Photos conversations.

---

## Generative AI Model Training

Google states:

> We don't train any generative AI models outside of Google Photos with your personal data in Google Photos.

However, this protection has limits when Google Photos is connected to other Google services.

When connecting Photos to other services, Google says it does **not** train generative AI models outside Google Photos directly on:

- Imagery from your Google Photos library
- Audio from your Google Photos library

But Google may train on derived data such as:

- Summaries
- Inferences
- Generated media based on the contents of your Photos library

---

## Human Review

### Ask Photos Responses

Human reviewers generally **do not review Ask Photos responses**, except:

- When you give feedback
- In rare cases to address abuse or harm

### Ask Photos Queries

Ask Photos queries may be reviewed by humans to improve Photos, but Google says privacy protections are applied first.

Before human review, Google takes steps such as:

- Disconnecting queries from Google Accounts
- Using specialized processes to remove sensitive content

Reviewed queries do **not** include:

- Ask Photos responses
- Your photos or videos
- Account information used by Ask Photos to generate responses

Users can turn off query review in settings.

---

## Opting Out of Query Donation

You can opt out of human review of your Ask Photos queries at any time.

This is called opting out of **query donation**.

---

## What Is Shared When You Give Feedback

When you submit feedback from Ask Photos, Google attaches additional information to help diagnose issues and improve the product.

Included information may be:

### Conversation Transcript

> Your queries, and Ask Photos' responses from the active Ask Photos conversation.

### Optional Screenshot

You may include a screenshot, but Google warns it could contain personal photos if visible.

> Please do not include screenshots that contain photos you do not want someone to view.

### List of Photos and 

[... summary truncated for context management ...]

---

# Document 163: Gemini for App Creation FAQ - AppSheet Help

Source URL: https://support.google.com/appsheet/answer/14797537?hl=en
Product area: appsheet
Original file: docs/gemini-for-app-creation-faq-appsheet-help-28b51a5e.md

# Gemini for App Creation FAQ — AppSheet Help

**Source:** <https://support.google.com/appsheet/answer/14797537?hl=en>

## Overview

**Gemini for App Creation** is an AI-assisted feature in AppSheet that helps app creators build apps by describing a business process or idea. It is available to **all AppSheet paid accounts**, including eligible Google Workspace customers and individual paid AppSheet plans.

## Key Excerpts

> Gemini for App Creation allows app creators to build an app by simply _describing_ a business process or idea.

> AppSheet will return a list of suggested tables and columns, and app creators can choose to have the app created with that data schema, along with some pre-built views and actions.

> Gemini for App Creation is included as part of your paid AppSheet license: AppSheet Publisher Pro, AppSheet Starter, AppSheet Core, or AppSheet Enterprise Plus.

> Turning Gemini for App Creation on or off only affects the use of Gemini for app creators. It will not affect any Gemini features in Workspace.

## Availability

Gemini for App Creation is available to users with paid AppSheet access, including:

- **AppSheet Publisher Pro**
- **AppSheet Starter**
- **AppSheet Core**
- **AppSheet Enterprise Plus**
- Google Workspace customers who have **AppSheet Core** included through their Workspace license

Related reference:

- [Google Workspace editions that include AppSheet Core](https://support.google.com/a/answer/10100275?sjid=14898439068259244864-NC#core-editions)

## What the Feature Does

App creators can use Gemini for App Creation to:

- Describe a business process or app idea in natural language
- Receive suggested:
  - Tables
  - Columns
  - Data schema
- Generate an app based on the suggested schema
- Start with some pre-built:
  - Views
  - Actions

This is designed to help accelerate app creation by using AI to draft the initial app structure.

## Admin Controls

Administrators can turn Gemini for App Creation **on or off**.

### How to Disable It

Users with administrator privileges can disable the AI-assisted app creation feature by following Google’s instructions:

- [Turn Gemini for App Creation on or off](https://support.google.com/appsheet/answer/11918568#gemini-in-appsheet)

### Scope of the Setting

The setting applies at the **team level**.

Important implication:

- If your organization has multiple AppSheet teams, you must disable the feature separately for each relevant team.

## Availability for Only Some Users

The same team-level setting is used if an admin wants Gemini for App Creation to be available only to certain users.

Because the control is applied at the **team level**, admins need to manage access by configuring the setting for the appropriate teams.

## Relationship to Gemini in Google Workspace

Turning Gemini for App Creation on or off affects only **Gemini for app creators in AppSheet**.

It does **not** affect Gemini features in Google Workspace.

## Gemini Enterprise or Gemini Workspace Requirement

You **do not** need Gemini Enterprise or Gemini Workspace to use Gemini for App Creation.

The feature is included with paid AppSheet licenses, including users who receive **AppSheet Core entitlements through Google Workspace licenses**.

## Key Takeaways

- Gemini for App Creation lets AppSheet users generate an app by describing an idea or business process.
- It suggests tables, columns, schema, views, and actions.
- It is included with paid AppSheet licenses and eligible Workspace-based AppSheet Core access.
- Admins can disable it, but controls are applied per team.
- Disabling Gemini for App Creation does not impact Gemini features in Workspace.
- No separate Gemini Enterprise or Gemini Workspace license is required.

---

# Document 165: Gemini for Google Workspace cheat sheet - Google Workspace Learning Center

Source URL: https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14143478?hl=en
Product area: workspace-learning-center
Original file: docs/gemini-for-google-workspace-cheat-sheet-google-workspace-learning-center-f25c1fff.md

# Gemini for Google Workspace Cheat Sheet — Summary

**Source:** Google Workspace Learning Center  
**URL:** https://support.google.com/a/users/answer/14143478?hl=en  
**Purpose:** Quick-reference guide for using Gemini in Google Workspace to write, rewrite, organize information, draft emails, create tables, and generate images.

---

## Key Excerpts

> Use generative AI to speed up and improve your writing, organize projects and events, and create custom images.

> _You can use this feature only if your organization supports it. For help, contact your administrator._

### Important Usage Warnings

> Gemini feature suggestions don’t represent Google’s views, and should not be attributed to Google.

> Don’t rely on Gemini features as medical, legal, financial, or other professional advice.

> Gemini features may suggest inaccurate or inappropriate information. Your feedback makes Gemini more helpful and safe.

> Enterprise end users can submit feedback to Google Workspace regarding their experience using generative AI features. End users are informed before submitting the feedback that feedback data should not contain personal, sensitive, or confidential information and may be read by humans.

---

# Overview

Gemini for Google Workspace can help users:

- Generate new written content in **Google Docs**
- Rewrite, summarize, shorten, or ask questions about selected text in **Google Docs**
- Draft and refine emails in **Gmail**
- Create organized tables in **Google Sheets**
- Generate custom images in **Google Slides**

Availability depends on whether the user’s organization supports Gemini features.

---

# Before Using Gemini in Google Workspace

## Availability

Gemini features are only available if enabled or supported by the user’s organization.

**Action:** If Gemini is unavailable, contact your Google Workspace administrator.

## Responsible Use Notes

Google emphasizes that Gemini outputs:

- Are AI-generated suggestions
- Do **not** represent Google’s views
- Should not be treated as professional advice
- May be inaccurate or inappropriate
- Should be reviewed carefully before use

## Feedback Privacy Warning

Enterprise users can submit feedback about generative AI features, but:

- Feedback should **not** contain personal, sensitive, or confidential information
- Feedback may be reviewed by humans

---

# Write with Gemini in Google Docs

Gemini in Docs can help users either write new text or work with existing selected text.

---

## Write Something New in Google Docs

Use this when you want Gemini to generate new text at a specific location in a document.

### Steps

1. Click in the document where you want to insert new text.
2. Click **Help me write**.
3. Enter a prompt describing what you want Gemini to write.
4. Click **Create** to preview the suggested text.
5. Optionally insert the generated text into the document.

### Key Action

**Prompt Gemini clearly** with what you want written, then review the preview before inserting.

### Related Help

- [Google Docs Editors Help Center — Help me write in Docs](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/13447609)

---

## Rewrite or Ask About Existing Text in Google Docs

Use this when you already have text and want Gemini to modify or analyze it.

### Steps

1. Select the text you want to rewrite or ask Gemini about.
2. Click **Help me write**.
3. Choose an option such as:
   - **Summarize**
   - **Shorten**
4. Enter a prompt asking Gemini to write something based on the selected text.

### Common Uses

- Summarizing selected content
- Shortening text
- Rewriting for tone, clarity, or length
- Asking Gemini to generate new content based on a passage

---

# Draft Email with Gemini in Gmail

Gemini can help create new email drafts or rewrite selected email text in Gmail.

## How to Use Gemini in Gmail Compose

Use Gemini inside a Gmail compose window.

### Steps

1. In a **Compose** window, click **Help me write**.
2. Enter your prompt.
3. Click **Create**.
4. Click **Recreate** to generate a new suggestion if needed.
5. Click **Refine** to:
   - Rewrite the suggested text
   - Choose a refinement option
   - Change your prompt
6. Click **Insert** to add the suggestion to your email.

### Key Controls

- **Create** — Generates an email draft or suggestion
- **Recreate** — Produces a different version
- **Refine** — Adjusts or rewrites the suggested text
- **Insert** — Adds the final suggestion into the email

### Related Help

- [Gmail Help Center — Help me write in Gmail](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/13384326)

---

# Create Tables with Gemini in Google Sheets

Gemini can generate structured tables in a blank Google Sheet based on a prompt.

## How to Create a Table

Start with a blank sheet, then ask Gemini to organize information into a table.

### Steps

1. At the top of the sheet, click **Ask Gemini**.
2. Select a suggested prompt or create your own.
3. Press **Enter**.
4. Click **Insert** to add the generated table to your sheet.

### Be

[... summary truncated for context management ...]

---

**If you do not agree with this, you cannot proceed further with this request.**

- Purpose of collection and use: handling inquiry and conducting marketing communications.
- **Retention and use period: until the end of the inquiry process and marketing communications, or as necessary for legal obligations or limited business purposes (see above privacy policy for more details).**

Unlock marketing efficiency and productivity with Gemini for Google Workspace

##### Elevate your marketing team’s people and work with Gemini for Google Workspace

Use the power of generative AI in familiar Workspace applications such as Gmail, Docs, and Slides to supercharge your marketing efforts and productivity:

- **Boost productivity:** Automate mundane tasks, generate content instantly, and streamline workflows—freeing you to allocate more time to strategic work.
- **Spark creativity:** Brainstorm innovative ideas, craft compelling messages, and design unique visuals—all supported by Gemini.
- **Privacy first:** Rest assured your data is safe and secure, never used for ads or shared outside your organization.

Download the handbook to learn more about how Gemini for Workspace can help your organization transform the way it does marketing.

I understand my personal data will be processed in accordance with Google's [Privacy Policy](https://myaccount.google.com/privacypolicy?hl=en).

As Gen AI introduces new ways to communicate and collaborate, security practitioners are tasked with keeping up with this rapid pace and innovation while not exposing their organizations to unnecessary risks.

Gemini for Google Workspace has a robust set of privacy, security, data governance, and compliance controls built in, allowing you to get the most out of Gen AI while remaining private, secure, and compliant. Gemini also has one of the most comprehensive sets of industry certifications, including **SOC 1/2/3, ISO 42001, FedRAMP High, HIPAA**, and more.

Workspace offers organizations support for migration including possible subsidies for migration costs, dedicated assistance, specialized tools, and a network of expert partners.

Enter your information and click "Download" to access a detailed whitepaper outlining how Google’s AI Principles have been incorporated into a set of privacy, security, data governance, and compliance controls built into Gemini for Google Workspace.

## Your AI powered writing assistant

### Polish drafts with ease

Turn rough notes or a few sentences into ready to send emails in seconds. Don't worry about grammar or spelling, Gemini has you covered.

![Polishing an email using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/_6L-u1z-nRt_IPJkoWrPelltl78lA2rMceH4-lBPpM_vVrw0Lp09OL783vbotvaF-ocuWjOFFV7KL4FvhYez9RqTcRRG5mToN1I=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## How to use Gemini in Gmail

##### Write emails faster with smart, personalized suggestions in Gmail

Learn how to use Gmail's new AI-powered contextual Smart Reply with Gemini. This feature helps you respond faster by generating contextual replies based on email content. Perfect for boosting productivity and keeping your inbox under control.

![Learn how to write emails faster with Gemini in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/7zD_UoRVLUEKOXEStM25MmtSPe5l5Yq3RjRve-2gill1tfAKaalBK8mWVErw0IrEOdBTSShPLUe1L4Fl6rYIBdXSBK_N5_vdM3PE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

##### Skip the scroll: Instantly get the gist of long emails and threads in Gmail

Overwhelmed by long email threads? Gemini in Gmail can summarize emails in seconds, so you get the key points fast. This video walks through how to use the 'Summarize' feature to boost email productivity.

![Learn more about Gmail summaries ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/70I0BdlHlQypjaPP9SbktJxZpUoGK068WG5jZMiTbItQF-Lvw6tfoUA_7WoEXkCfGz0G3fUa0tZ3hn9IAXiZ-wHXS8YzihkdO2Pw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

##### Turn rough drafts into polished emails â with one swipe

Make your emails sound polished and professional with Gemini in Gmail. This video shows how to use AI to rewrite, improve tone, and clarify your drafts, saving you time and helping you communicate better. Whether it's a quick update or a formal note, Gemini makes email editing easy.

- Gemini is available to all Gmail users with a [Google AI or Ultra plan](https://one.google.com/about/ai-premium/) and is included with all [Google Workspace subscription plans](https://workspace.google.com/solutions/ai/).
- You can customize how Gemini responds and even regenerate your most recent response. You can ask Gemini to give you a shorter or more detailed response, simplify language, or adjust the tone to be more casual or formal, depending on your preferences.
- As part of Google, Gemini makes privacy a top priority. We do not sell your personal information to anyone and we use automated tools to remove personally identifiable information (PII) from data subsets used to train Gemini. Users also have control over what data is shared with Gemini and reviewers. [Learn more about Geminiâs privacy policy](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961).

## Multiple ways to get caught up

![A screenshot of Gemini AI assistant in Gmail summarising tasks for an upcoming group trip](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/5U6_iT7_9d8rTkJqIOU-U0JEOm5uN6V85xmLD9QRwQy9x1QUkudm2gVh35gkXgXfQ5W7ZU7uNEUVdijJx5t5KSo4hpU4n_ET2uXR=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Gemini AI assistant in Gmail providing a project progress report](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/0NCx9tiQBbGGBxWySt2is--t5AlU_Ixclk1u64gnrius4xWgrhBv0tMCuh6L1Qf4-TSlB8g7vknJ813GdHwtQP0PwDYigCZBX2s3_A=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Summarise lengthy emails with a click or tap

Tap the 'Summarise this email' button at the top of your email threads to use Gemini to help you quickly catch up on lengthy conversations.

![A screenshot of Gemini AI assistant in Gmail summarising tasks for an upcoming group trip](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/OCH4iibpAsoQggae-fz2hMt6oc279BD6iCg1A9-iH0U2Q_k2tShmWRhduviM3pry13sg5GiXZLAtPu6ZWFW5QFBj28GWkc6ypXKG=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Use the side panel to summarise

Use the pre-populated buttons to get more detailed summaries or next steps and action items.

![Pre-generated email responses using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/EMdthVPzxr4mXExTbLN9wrj5dRsH39EYlV4kAK8nRt8E_pD5EwR0Z7IBVQaH4JfFnfBT_rYbeE7QAfQPSjWj9CNom2CPFT5pCwk=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Ask Gemini for more complex summaries

You can also ask Gemini for more complex summaries about a particular topic or from a specific person.

![Gemini AI assistant in Gmail providing a project progress report](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/pu2bQx9gFAKTM20gbwQ5-DvIYuJ3yYu6liB0OT8j0l6Anp1Ag5ZGRA3Q6CzerkfjJpfpBFuKP-CO808joqklOBEgZ5XSgaZKtvQZ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Your AI-powered writing assistant

### Polish drafts with ease

Turn rough notes or a few sentences into ready-to-send emails in seconds. Don't worry about grammar or spelling, Gemini has you covered.

![Polishing an email using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/_6L-u1z-nRt_IPJkoWrPelltl78lA2rMceH4-lBPpM_vVrw0Lp09OL783vbotvaF-ocuWjOFFV7KL4FvhYez9RqTcRRG5mToN1I=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Compose or reply with prompts

Look for the 'HelpÂ me write' icon in your compose window and start typing out a prompt. More detailed prompts will result in more detailed responses.

![Prompting Gemini AI assistant in Gmail to write a personalised cover letter](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/gyzuFSElEhN722aNwxpVQA5tIXoDKS6Sssg0CBUWNd7GApRo8G-Yu5oJdGvF9ro_0u2anZUlWR90uJjBwcJWbOIVvCGb2lYT0Xc=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Reference info from Google Drive files in your responses

Gemini can pull details from a specific file into your email responses. Simply tag the file with '@' and type in the name of the file that you want to reference.

![Gemini AI assistant in Gmail writing a response email using data from a Sheets file](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/eLLFsnDiQE5-gglZh9WJIG-TzrabAWp06KUPR21mfGzcAON6MeR7S1gciBjBoUhdOAlNJgA6GZKETks28SMYL4WHOa341UZqBaLz=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Respond to emails faster with Contextual Smart Reply

Gemini can provide fully detailed responses based on the context of your emails. Hover over the suggestions to see a full draft of the response before selecting one to edit or send.

![Smart Reply options using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/CPcQJ7Gl1plTTRM_NYyK2H59lnZgBMvPugO3uGQ2A_cb5m8OVLAopnr8WAel1KYCwfgF0rU9wBjqEJsI-08AaBxivYbv7kAd-Oc=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

![Polishing an email using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/HN4cmGo008vrPzWWV887Obhj3XRwPuxxUYCK3JCxG0_2s71eSaiAXNe5BBXlL9elwxYKM4SWIOK4AEPPtOMwT-Nhn-gEVAoH_6c=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Prompting Gemini AI assistant in Gmail to write a personalised cover letter](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/uCC6dxRx76Qrtc1D6gSvjEl2scuIAo0zMQ0ti9ZrWuwPmtIRGPUAbswHSl8y1CHbTD35BKOmqJpeRv4QmWR85WkFzY90iyfR9yjDjA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

## More precise search results

![Finding hotel confirmation details using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/6oMovZDxk4NnWwtO1xMycJ-2PsH5GRpiSpmhYNTJdr38fc2xV09EkAhG_VpIMOtP-RsHojAQyfZ_IfneaX_IhBI6Y2X7-Tu5zvwQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Ask Gemini to search your inbox

Use the side panel to find key details buried in your inbox like confirmation numbers or purchase receipts. Gemini can also handle more complex tasks like comparing vendor bids and availability from different emails.

![Finding hotel confirmation details using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/iLR7Gbdf7OQuk_NQTZ0thmvYcoGlEPXE1rP-Fz9xEptDsNzOjeuSNuFZzpXYNOiR-vLuNCRt5Ye5D5kQf-rlyBy6axVSVe1lOO4q=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Gemini can also search specific Google Drive files

Just ask Gemini what you're looking for and tag the file using the '@' symbol.

![Identifying deadlines within a Sheets file using Gemini AI assistant in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/tarTfjMbCO72dCOLRoRS2RrBfntqD07qx7hm-PJku8V5sLJZBRsN6MEe7PcajL8WnElzV8N4-ZmM699XaTl3UArNeSSKf4AbmRlgKA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## How to use Gemini in Gmail

##### Write emails faster with smart, personalised suggestions in Gmail

Learn how to use Gmail's new AI-powered Contextual Smart Reply with Gemini. This feature helps you to respond faster by generating contextual replies based on email content. Perfect for boosting productivity and keeping your inbox under control.

![Learn how to write emails faster with Gemini in Gmail ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/7zD_UoRVLUEKOXEStM25MmtSPe5l5Yq3RjRve-2gill1tfAKaalBK8mWVErw0IrEOdBTSShPLUe1L4Fl6rYIBdXSBK_N5_vdM3PE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

##### Skip the scroll: Instantly get the gist of long emails and threads in Gmail

Overwhelmed by long email threads? Gemini in Gmail can summarise emails in seconds, so you get the key points fast. This video walks through how to use the 'Summarise' feature to boost email productivity.

![Learn more about Gmail summaries ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/70I0BdlHlQypjaPP9SbktJxZpUoGK068WG5jZMiTbItQF-Lvw6tfoUA_7WoEXkCfGz0G3fUa0tZ3hn9IAXiZ-wHXS8YzihkdO2Pw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

##### Turn rough drafts into polished emails â with one swipe

Make your emails sound polished and professional with Gemini in Gmail. This video shows how to use AI to rewrite, improve tone and clarify your drafts, saving you time and helping you to communicate better. Whether it's a quick update or a formal note, Gemini makes email editing easy.

![Learn how to turn rough drafts into polished emails ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/TNtuD8GiNy3PrMUOGZm3jgfMz7qKQTN-EmB8kZ_NgmFZ2955LB6dWS_pEpkLpt9hDVcEbTVTIru9jBcRqxv7vVd8lTDzbHxh-VFJXA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

##### Stop digging through emails: Instantly find what you're looking for with AI

Searching your inbox just got smarter. Use Gemini's side panel Q&A feature to quickly find dates, names and other key info buried in your Gmail threads. This feature lets you ask questions and get precise answers without digging through endless emails.

![Learn the best way to find things in your Gmail inbox](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/bLS2QqK3MOhfDwKGaS5jQtrYpto4axm-KeFMYZl339pWvvY61chQfsAmivf0VyU9ZIeKgZRyCAihjWgQS-58R4hC1PI5x-Vxa5NZXw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

##### Struggling to write emails? Let Gmail write the first draft

Struggling with writer's block in your inbox? Gmail's 'Help me write' feature can create entire email drafts from a simple prompt. In this video, you'll learn how to use AI to draft messages for any situation. Save time and sound great with just a few clicks.

![Learn how Gemini in Gmail can help you to write emails ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/yR7M0LbLwwt2vd9ATrOFhaMnMNQFeVPeUi6_5i9vnqALKdi2p70INIhWKMvSG20avsTJwQbK36WqYnJx0AEdNU-RaCopEYbfczmf=e365-pa-nu-rw-w800)

## Curious about AI in Gmail?

Take a look at our FAQ to learn more.

Expand all

- Gemini is available to all Gmail users with a [Google AI or Ultra plan](https://one.google.com/about/ai-premium/?hl=en-GB) and is included with all [Google Workspace subscription plans](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/solutions/ai/).
- You can customise how Gemini responds and even regenerate your most recent response. You can ask Gemini to give you a shorter or more detailed response, simplify language or adjust the tone to be more casual or formal, depending on your preferences.
- As part of Google, Gemini makes privacy a top priority. We do not sell your personal information to anyone and we use automated tools to remove personally identifiable information (PII) from data subsets used to train Gemini. Users also have control over what data is shared with Gemini and reviewers. [Learn more about Gemini's privacy policy](https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961?hl=en-GB).

# Gemini in Google Meet

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/ai-for-meetings?hl=en

![Google Meet product logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/rR-i1eFrEEwgI931sCOkIrBvlb8vJ7zE9LQyFvozozcTJHxB_gx0GV1dLH526LK2sXYtxb5MTZGB78rx1KXzpNBv35fXmKnGXwIY=e365-pa-nu-rw-w2497)

# Gemini in Google Meet

Leverage the power of AI to make the most of meetings. Use AI in Meet to take notes, reduce audio distortion, improve video quality, provide translated captions and more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-ai_for_meetings-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-ai_for_meetings-hero-en-GB)

![GeminiÂ inÂ Google Meet taking meeting notes and translating Arabic to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/R7JSlQ5g2uE1Wii4wszjc6uIJHN3ZS3nb0tVJY4ZwgfmcEH914rj4igvYDXbvvb3_BM5a6OeKX8YQKpcWWBFJuzoNgJfkJdfIqOB-w=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Smarter meetings with AI

Gemini in Meet makes [video conferencing](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/video-conferencing/) more engaging and productive. AI-powered features like automatic note taking and translated captions let you focus on the meeting and improve efficiency.

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet summarising video meeting notes and delivering them to a Gmail inbox. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4eDK08G4zSR-_R0S9fZxItvWn0uGITpbDg0s_qdGNjr1HcSytlxgtkgiT-7RMPnwRmKOySBzBJrfinTZJcnO1D9NK_b0KEgbNZw5hw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet translating a meeting from Korean to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/XxntRXTj3uwDgCyxGlNWaPC-EXpiG-bdGRomcOFVA_T8AnJ4EavwK-CnNEojD-Q8f_ZnHcCZgurabA4kosVaYG57pLXojt30adM=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![A group of people in a hybrid meeting with adaptive audio merging the laptop audio to prevent audio feedback. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/hz9ADaGg86kMpi_3vXO8eN30HeFmpVLQEIIi7psupLXxZf4Phzm8PPFDKJ4XTlj9gbd0BGWcgq7MV8UMCrHoEHIWrher5LAzt7fA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Watermarking in Google Meet. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/bz6pZqLKWf9cwhsNUtGGEpcijpTLWOfA06B-yPGSc-JKre9nq4NoPu7s-BFGHHlvQiUMDb85KjPAfuBY_qQKDDxaRj8KjDR809p0=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Summarise video meetings

Using AI in video conferencing, ask Gemini in [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/meet) to '[take notes for me](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14754931?hl=en-GB)', allowing you to give your full attention to the discussion. GeminiÂ inÂ Meet summarises your video call and automatically sends you meeting notes in [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/products/gmail/).

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet summarising video meeting notes and delivering them to a Gmail inbox. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/9v5eZkZ_wkUqWDz6HCbtwULzIJjN8_HXSHAtSini1XmxNysbujayZ8tEfS2EV6_bMaVMaeCI3_yb_0T2CXU75py6Duk3v7JrCtTMNA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Break down language barriers

Gemini in Meet makes video conferencing more accessible for everyone, using AI for translated captions. Gemini in Meet helps remove language barriers, translating speech in real time with [translated captions](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10964115?hl=en-GB) for 60+ languages. In addition, people who are hearing-impaired or who prefer to follow the conversation in a visual format can [turn on live captions](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10964115?hl=en-GB).

![GeminiÂ inÂ Meet translating a meeting from Korean to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AHB8iuJR0iFZLEl85pt9UOeUDBR9mxuxxAHaSR5cKrvxoHSBe8WTOK8xm7kD6NN5QfeQbDSx3aafs8EuZmslpuCt3uQUTo0mM7-s8w=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Create ad hoc meeting spaces

[Adaptive audio in Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/echo-cancellation/#adaptive-audio) automatically detects multiple laptops in a room, synchronises microphones and speakers, and [prevents awkward echoes and audio feedback](https://workspaceupdates.googleblog.com/2024/05/google-meet-adaptive-audio.html#:~:text=With%20%E2%80%9Cadaptive%20audio%2C%E2%80%9D%20you,for%20dedicated%20conference%20room%20equipment.). This flexibility allows teams to create ad hoc meeting spaces anywhere with just their laptops.

![A group of people in a hybrid meeting with adaptive audio merging the laptop audio to prevent audio feedback. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/coFuFhNIw5l8_TZJGl5gzR29QU82-Y7Sbh2u8l1D-vhn8CLnd7UpC1G-xhj9VUiN5XmbBGdqLt4Znd8gUreeFASVZARJlWm2e5E=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Protect your shared content in meetings

Watermarking in Meet helps protect your presented content and video feeds from unauthorised copying and distribution. A subtle overlay of the viewer's email and meeting ID will identify the source and discourage sharing of confidential meeting content.

![Watermarking in Google Meet. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Yb8mpPIUKjqwBOZ2r0bpAUA3Ax2_DqB_k-HbLIBUi3eCN0J0KuAjpVUQ3ePl8vssyjTzfSqpQ8uFNctIPdpJomdRIQbVXyTwKnbETw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Clear communication in every meeting

### Put your best face forward

Experience [improved visuals](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14441737?hl=en-GB) with studio look and polished lighting with studio lighting â all powered by AI. Plus, [create AI-generated backgrounds](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/13954947?hl=en-GB) to customise your virtual space.

![AI-generated background with studio look and studio light in Google Meet improving the visual. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/ij55BwnMLfkEwvY4bSgoJlpdKG0nO5Ho8Vm832j1d3PsFoKvCCWaloGJWkfaB6Lk0QSexrJBwKXb1MJ2GAIQoghq6t4LyUHcMh5X=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Be heard clearly

Enjoy crystal-clear conversations even with Bluetooth headsets or phone dial-ins. Studio sound uses AI to enhance audio quality, making sure that everyone is heard clearly, however they join the meeting.

Gemini in Meet makes [video conferencing](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/video-conferencing/) more engaging and productive. AI-powered features like automatic note taking and translated captions let you focus on the meeting and improve efficiency.

### Summarize video meetings

Using AI in video conferencing, ask Gemini in [Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/meet) to "[take notes for me](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/14754931?hl=en-CA)", allowing you to give your full attention to the discussion. Gemini in Meet summarizes your video call and automatically sends you meeting notes in [Gmail](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/products/gmail/).

![Gemini in Meet summarizing video meeting notes and delivering them to a Gmail inbox. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/9v5eZkZ_wkUqWDz6HCbtwULzIJjN8_HXSHAtSini1XmxNysbujayZ8tEfS2EV6_bMaVMaeCI3_yb_0T2CXU75py6Duk3v7JrCtTMNA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Break down language barriers

Gemini in Meet makes video conferencing more accessible for everyone, using AI for translated captions. Gemini in Meet helps remove language barriers, translating speech in real-time with [translated captions](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10964115?hl=en-CA) for 60+ languages. In addition, people who are hearing-impaired or who prefer to follow the conversation in a visual format can [turn on live captions](https://support.google.com/meet/answer/10964115?hl=en-CA).

![Gemini in Meet translating a meeting from Korean to English. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/AHB8iuJR0iFZLEl85pt9UOeUDBR9mxuxxAHaSR5cKrvxoHSBe8WTOK8xm7kD6NN5QfeQbDSx3aafs8EuZmslpuCt3uQUTo0mM7-s8w=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Create ad hoc meeting spaces

[Adaptive audio in Google Meet](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/resources/echo-cancellation/#adaptive-audio) automatically detects multiple laptops in a room, synchronizes microphones and speakers, and [prevents awkward echoes and audio feedback](https://workspaceupdates.googleblog.com/2024/05/google-meet-adaptive-audio.html#:~:text=With%20%E2%80%9Cadaptive%20audio%2C%E2%80%9D%20you,for%20dedicated%20conference%20room%20equipment.). This flexibility allows teams to create ad-hoc meeting spaces anywhere with just their laptops.

![A group of people in a hybrid meeting with adaptive audio merging the laptop audio to prevent audio feedback. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/coFuFhNIw5l8_TZJGl5gzR29QU82-Y7Sbh2u8l1D-vhn8CLnd7UpC1G-xhj9VUiN5XmbBGdqLt4Znd8gUreeFASVZARJlWm2e5E=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Protect your shared content in meetings

Watermarking in Meet helps protect your presented content and video feeds from unauthorized copying and distribution. A subtle overlay of the viewerâs email and meeting ID will identify the source and discourage sharing of confidential meeting content.

![Watermarking in Google Meet. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/Yb8mpPIUKjqwBOZ2r0bpAUA3Ax2_DqB_k-HbLIBUi3eCN0J0KuAjpVUQ3ePl8vssyjTzfSqpQ8uFNctIPdpJomdRIQbVXyTwKnbETw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

# Gemini in Google Sheets

## Build spreadsheets quickly with AI

Gemini helps you instantly structure your data, build powerful data visualizations, and more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en-CA) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets to better work with your data.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user whoâs asked for a table of this yearâs budget with color coding and dropdown menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/VW8rHX1w0QpnJR5XkNzdjMrpuur7EcftbmgITcAoIsmMwwORaNSoLONkjUlO0oi3MmTJSt4RrDDAYacFzh0QT8MP5U9Hfuoj4xkh=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4O8aeX2OgSX1lCYXoFhEjtJ0Ux975JNfQ5nf0R7w35E7E0YjVMJMq6qNfAOHSYNZinhb4TPDNVfrlprLN1vOv4F-QotTgJt1NrFR=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Create tables in a snap

Quickly [create tables](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565?hl=en-CA) with Gemini to organize data, plan schedules, or track a project. Use a prompt to generate exactly what you need, fast.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user whoâs asked for a table of this yearâs budget with color coding and dropdown menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/6DDW8X1rjAsuhptie3fOhMl_EZHT3RyI3zMnEpMyDu6ym6fkzlIEidHvnIslnu9VLJjKH7uXdQofiJsgaBQkqeyZNFiw6THwgx4=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Generate precise formulas

Ask Gemini to [create formulas](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565?hl=en-CA) that simplify complex calculations. Gemini can even proactively suggest additional formulas to help you manage your data more efficiently, saving you time and reducing errors.

![In Google Sheets, Gemini generates a formula for the user to calculate the amounts needed to reach revenue goals. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/f-C1pchxW1Dztmh0OsUqFqui2LOqk--ikp1KK76BHdEJzEMTYhIEmOvdfAUp3j4ypoXgACrHEzIfR8RbYJwcMvGhnOCHhFYV_Cs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Quickly handle complex edits and formatting

Donât waste time manually formatting your data - just ask Gemini to build pivot tables, find and replace text, apply conditional formatting, and much more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en-CA) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets.

![In the foreground, a user prompts Gemini to fill a column in Google Sheets with dropdown menus. In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/nCVIFRk2nbUwgvj7gkOFfbLq65o58YV6WkJL3jrs7f6HTkNhCTBz17L1rny2OJKnuoI8IZNfr4fjk2zlXDKdemXq3xfb0dnIThbyGQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Reduce data entry errors

Gemini can recognize patterns as you enter data and automatically fill in the remaining entries, reducing errors, and ensuring data integrity.

![Gemini offers to fill 8 additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/FMiIffYjLGjT93qaoki8hz8PgOGEWkQrdeXTOSLKwmA7V317IENrOojog_0zSKRSjbObglegyush8h-uiEZjul-eQH-7tB2EK9I2iA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Unlock AI actions at scale

With the AI function, Gemini saves you time by running multiple actions in your spreadsheet at once. From any cell, Gemini will generate, summarize, or categorize text at scale based on your specific instructions.

![Gemini gets ready to action a generative prompt made in a cell on a spreadsheet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/BPETc1qwJWNm1yzd9B0IZ11htFLadPOAc1vAebZGLMH9vCwU6Bl09JcnU-BFIRE4-YOaI5mlnj3iunJfqcP8Yr0dwovzBNYesMI24g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Premium AI including Gemini in Sheets is now part of Google Workspace plans. [Explore plans and pricing.](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-body-en-CA&hl=en-CA&ga_region=amer&ga_country=ca&ga_lang=en)
- If there is an existing pattern, Gemini in Google Sheets can automatically populate text-based fields with data with the [enhanced Smart Fill](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14226603?hl=en-CA) feature, saving time on manually entering text.
- Gemini in Sheets can create tables and charts, build organizational templates, generate formulas, structure and clean data, and more.
- Gemini for Workspace is included in all Google Workspace apps, including Google Sheets.
- Gemini offers the same [enterprise-grade security](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_ca/security/) as the rest of Google Workspace, including Google Sheets. Gemini automatically applies your organizationâs existing controls, permissions, and data handling practices. None of the content in Sheets is shared with outsiders and is not used to train generative AI models outside your organization without permission.
- Gemini in Sheets can work with large data sets, including numerical values, text, and other information in cells. Use Gemini in sheets to clean data and spot inconsistencies, highlight specific dates or values, and transform information into easy-to-read charts and tables.

![Sheets icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-mcAqMbDR4NVFZtXfQ7CgO-b6ddff6fe15975951c341392eeff5bfe-sheets_2026-192px.optimized.svg)

Do more with your spreadsheets in less time with help from AI. Gemini makes it easy to create tables, analyze your data, and more.

[...] Now that everyone has access to Gemini, the entire team is empowered to expand their skillset and glean insights from their own analyses instead of exclusively funneling the requests through a single analysis partner.

**Justinian Fornonberry**, Chief Information Security Officer, Etsy

[Learn more](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v%3DwfDJgOs8fBQ%26t%3D682s&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1752000263521714&usg=AOvVaw3umlepucXVyB9sdaU_at5i )

![Adore Me Logo](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-7wGsTTpZlxk5YUQV6jGK3r-d0327b914315ec68316a70cc37906f7d-Logo_AdoreMe__1_.svg)

> One of my favorite parts of Gemini in Sheets is that it helps me create formulas. I used to have to go to as many as five different sources to figure out how to write the correct formula. Now with Gemini in Sheets I can just type what I need and Gemini will provide the formula perfectly written out and reference relevant cells - this functionality has completely changed the way I work with Sheets. I'm saving time and can better understand how formulas work to make calculations.

**Ranjan Roy**, SVP of Strategy, Adore Me

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/working-speed-fashion-trends-duet-ai )

![Attache Logo ](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-3WpQyiQ5cvoc1Od8MTnpnF-8f8d1bc1b12c3bd7576aa84182d478e3-Logo_Attache.svg)

> It used to be challenging to keep track of where we were in the process but Gemini in Google Sheets has become our secret weapon, allowing us to design step-driven processes with unparalleled flexibility. Now, we have a unified place to build and organize plans, trackers, and timelines, and keep them up to date in real time.

**Tim Tochette**, Owner & President, Attache

[Learn more](https://workspace.google.com/blog/customer-stories/attache-transforming-menial-magical-gemini-google-workspace )

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Premium AI including Gemini in Sheets is now part of Google Workspace plans. [Explore plans and pricing.](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-body-en&hl=en&ga_region=amer&ga_country=us&ga_lang=en)
- If there is an existing pattern, Gemini in Google Sheets can automatically populate text-based fields with data with the [enhanced Smart Fill](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14226603) feature, saving time on manually entering text.
- Gemini in Sheets can create tables and charts, build organizational templates, generate formulas, structure and clean data, and more.
- Gemini for Workspace is included in all Google Workspace apps, including Google Sheets.
- Gemini offers the same [enterprise-grade security](https://workspace.google.com/security/) as the rest of Google Workspace, including Google Sheets. Gemini automatically applies your organizationâs existing controls, permissions, and data handling practices. None of the content in Sheets is shared with outsiders and is not used to train generative AI models outside your organization without permission.
- Gemini in Sheets can work with large data sets, including numerical values, text, and other information in cells. Use Gemini in sheets to clean data and spot inconsistencies, highlight specific dates or values, and transform information into easy-to-read charts and tables.

![Sheets icon](https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-workspace-assets/uploads/7uffzv9dk4sn-mcAqMbDR4NVFZtXfQ7CgO-b6ddff6fe15975951c341392eeff5bfe-sheets_2026-192px.optimized.svg)

# Gemini in Google Sheets

Source: https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/resources/spreadsheet-ai?hl=en

![Google Sheets product logo](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2AYp_NaSI1M03E7e56V0JYKeE-_usMYCys-s5rdWzyMtapPLD8Ix7LsUeImaTF-h8NUVWkmW9jvGoeRKEqNdCqsDtTC_HBoZ1ZYDlw=e365-pa-nu-rw-w2742)

# Gemini in Google Sheets

Do more with your spreadsheets in less time with help from AI. Gemini makes it easy to create tables, analyse your data and more.

[Get Started Now](https://workspace.google.com/business/signup/welcome?hl=en-GB&source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-hero-en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)[Contact sales](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/contact/?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-hero-en-GB)

![Gemini in Sheets](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/hWd8X9ijmNPP4n8d1GhGsJJYNxz1w3UcjbDtKFm13D9iTloHdzcXFGxNfWEA3aCRn3oH6xoZRy0rAKd3w6nva4kMHJ-FfkGTm6v9Vg=e365-pa-nu-rw-w528)

## Build spreadsheets quickly with AI

Gemini helps you instantly structure your data, build powerful data visualisations and more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en-GB) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets to work better with your data.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user who's asked for a table of this year's budget with colour coding and drop-down menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/VW8rHX1w0QpnJR5XkNzdjMrpuur7EcftbmgITcAoIsmMwwORaNSoLONkjUlO0oi3MmTJSt4RrDDAYacFzh0QT8MP5U9Hfuoj4xkh=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![In Google Sheets, Gemini generates a formula for the user to calculate the amounts needed to reach revenue goals. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/jNR9v3LtazIdC9ZvOyBUf0QZRytTPnMSc8SGpT8Lyw2BFjIBoIE-GgTNC7PuKk72wzbpSypF0uFHLGNlO5-QOfchXoqIvhokrj0uKg=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![In the foreground, a user prompts Gemini to fill a column in Google Sheets with drop-down menus. In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4O8aeX2OgSX1lCYXoFhEjtJ0Ux975JNfQ5nf0R7w35E7E0YjVMJMq6qNfAOHSYNZinhb4TPDNVfrlprLN1vOv4F-QotTgJt1NrFR=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

![Gemini offers to fill eight additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns that it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/4uUstR7j7cHoOFc3HRuTZjCvVEYs7tZI9ApReToUSeY9SKkYiuA48fDqDVjCo-v4fQAdRN7ewTI33fS43VYyM6YdpKfQwJuy-xT-=e365-pa-nu-rw-w684)

### Create tables in a snap

Quickly [create tables](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565?hl=en-GB) with Gemini to organise data, plan schedules or track a project. Use a prompt to generate exactly what you need, fast.

![Gemini creates a Google Sheet for a user who's asked for a table of this year's budget with colour coding and drop-down menus.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/6DDW8X1rjAsuhptie3fOhMl_EZHT3RyI3zMnEpMyDu6ym6fkzlIEidHvnIslnu9VLJjKH7uXdQofiJsgaBQkqeyZNFiw6THwgx4=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Generate precise formulas

Ask Gemini to [create formulas](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14218565?hl=en-GB) that simplify complex calculations. Gemini can even proactively suggest additional formulas to help you manage your data more efficiently, saving you time and reducing errors.

![In Google Sheets, Gemini generates a formula for the user to calculate the amounts needed to reach revenue goals. ](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/f-C1pchxW1Dztmh0OsUqFqui2LOqk--ikp1KK76BHdEJzEMTYhIEmOvdfAUp3j4ypoXgACrHEzIfR8RbYJwcMvGhnOCHhFYV_Cs=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Quickly handle complex edits and formatting

Don't waste time manually formatting your data â just ask Gemini to build pivot tables, find and replace text, apply conditional formatting and much more. [Learn more](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14356410?hl=en-GB) about everything you can do with Gemini in Sheets.

![In the foreground, a user prompts Gemini to fill a column in Google Sheets with drop-down menus. In the background, Gemini performs the simple task.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/nCVIFRk2nbUwgvj7gkOFfbLq65o58YV6WkJL3jrs7f6HTkNhCTBz17L1rny2OJKnuoI8IZNfr4fjk2zlXDKdemXq3xfb0dnIThbyGQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

### Reduce data-entry errors

Gemini can recognise patterns as you enter data and automatically fill in the remaining entries, reducing errors and ensuring data integrity.

![Gemini offers to fill eight additional rows in a Google Sheet based on the data patterns that it detects.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/FMiIffYjLGjT93qaoki8hz8PgOGEWkQrdeXTOSLKwmA7V317IENrOojog_0zSKRSjbObglegyush8h-uiEZjul-eQH-7tB2EK9I2iA=e365-pa-nu-rw-w527)

## Unlock AI actions at scale

With the AI function, Gemini saves you time by running multiple actions in your spreadsheet at once. From any cell, Gemini will generate, summarise or categorise text at scale based on your specific instructions.

![Gemini gets ready to action a generative prompt made in a cell on a spreadsheet.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/BPETc1qwJWNm1yzd9B0IZ11htFLadPOAc1vAebZGLMH9vCwU6Bl09JcnU-BFIRE4-YOaI5mlnj3iunJfqcP8Yr0dwovzBNYesMI24g=e365-pa-nu-rw-w608)

## Confidently analyse data with Gemini

Turn raw data into actionable insights. Gemini helps you structure, visualise and analyse your data efficiently, helping you make more informed decisions.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to analyse data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2U28LoRdLLg0DRwOWH75EcLpz8q7kfFmyetRMWwFKMgjmihP48-Ecg3yj9IGJWEHCuUJEvl48koTuY-vdlRTtUZK53mTICoXDvYE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Understand your data

Gemini quickly helps you identify trends, outliers and key findings, providing big-picture insights from your data with natural language prompts.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to create a pie chart using the data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/oXTjXRWXg-GQS5qfFXXVaoTQOXV3AxO-WFc6RxqpwqhbTvJrlKcKwnmwV8nc3VL1JD4MljH91STaXvoLNWRlDbIJIaFOoVfQvImn=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Build charts and graphs

Gemini can help you turn raw data into charts and graphs quickly, reducing the need to manually build scatter plots, bar graphs, pie charts and more.

![A user asks Gemini in Google Sheets to find an answer in the data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/NUsUZjiYkz6kYRmVJCST60ykJmKOySzRFh5TJ1nsIWDkNPL5twW3K3FN7xpITtNJcmY_VSuBHgdcLzILkiz2xAZRyTymZSEe9qNWyQ=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

### Find answers quickly

Looking for a specific detail in your data? Simply ask Gemini for it and quickly see the response instead of manually searching for it or using a complex calculation.

![A user prompts Gemini in Google Sheets to analyse data that they're working with.](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/2U28LoRdLLg0DRwOWH75EcLpz8q7kfFmyetRMWwFKMgjmihP48-Ecg3yj9IGJWEHCuUJEvl48koTuY-vdlRTtUZK53mTICoXDvYE=e365-pa-nu-rw-w739)

Gemini can help you turn raw data into charts and graphs quickly, reducing the need to manually build scatter plots, bar graphs, pie charts and more.

### Find answers quickly

Looking for a specific detail in your data? Simply ask Gemini for it and quickly see the response instead of manually searching for it or using a complex calculation.

## Frequently asked questions

Expand all

- Premium AI, including Gemini in Sheets, is now part of Google Workspace plans. [Explore plans and pricing.](https://workspace.google.com/pricing.html?source=gafb-spreadsheet_ai-body-en-GB&hl=en-GB&ga_region=emea&ga_country=uk&ga_lang=en)
- If there is an existing pattern, Gemini in Google Sheets can automatically populate text-based fields with data with the [enhanced Smart Fill](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/14226603?hl=en-GB) feature, saving time on manually entering text.
- Gemini in Sheets can create tables and charts, build organisational templates, generate formulas, structure and clean data, and more.
- Gemini for Workspace is included in all Google Workspace apps, including Google Sheets.
- Gemini offers the same [enterprise-grade security](https://workspace.google.com/intl/en_uk/security/) as the rest of Google Workspace, including Google Sheets. Gemini automatically applies your organisation's existing controls, permissions and data handling practices. None of the content in Sheets is shared with outsiders and it is not used to train generative AI models outside your organisation without permission.
- Gemini in Sheets can work with large data sets, including numerical values, text and other information in cells. Use Gemini in Sheets to clean data and spot inconsistencies, highlight specific dates or values and transform information into easy-to-read charts and tables.

# Gemini in Workspace Apps Activity Events Stay organized with collections Save and categorize content based on your preferences.

This document lists the events and parameters for
various types of
Gemini in Workspace Apps activity events. You can retrieve these events by
calling [Activities.list()](https://developers.google.com/workspace/admin/reports/v1/reference/activities/list)
with `applicationName=gemini_in_workspace_apps`.

Note: 'Gemini in Workspace apps' logs will be available starting 2025-06-20T00:00:00Z. From this date forward, a rolling history of up to 180 days will be maintained.

## Gemini in Workspace Apps Utilization Event

Event type for usage related events.
Events of this type are returned with `type=ai_usage_event`.

### Gen AI Usage

Event is triggered when a user performs an action that uses Gemini in any of the Workspace apps.

| Event details | |
| --- | --- |
| Event name | `feature_utilization` |
| Parameters | |  |  | | --- | --- | | `action` | `string`  Action performed by the user within a Workspace application, initiated or assisted by Gemini. Possible values:   - `add_to_calendar` Gmail: User added an event extracted from their email to their calendar using Gemini. - `auto_proofread` Gmail: Use case for polishing a draft inline at a minimum of sentence level granularity. It provides proactive suggestions to improve draft quality. - `bulletize` Slides: Corresponds to "Bulletize" button in Help me Write entrypoint under textbox. Gemini returns the selected text organized into bullet points. - `classic_use_case_convert_rubric` Classroom: User clicks on "+Rubric", then "Convert from file" on the Assignment creation page, which uploads a grading rubric based on the input Drive file. - `classic_use_case_generate_audio_lesson` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate audio lesson" button, which generates an audio lesson, including a Slides presentation of the transcript, based on the input grade, topic or content. - `classic_use_case_generate_choice_board` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate" button on the Build a choice board page, which generates a board of sample student exercises based on the input grade, topic & instructional materials. - `classic_use_case_generate_common_misconceptions` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate" button on the Tackle common misconceptions page, which generates a list of common issues that students face, based on the input grade & topic. - `classic_use_case_generate_feedback` Classroom: User clicks on the "Help me write" on the assignment grading page, which generates a comment about the student's submission, based on the input grade and feedback topic. - `classic_use_case_generate_hooks` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate" button on the Craft a compelling hook page, which generates a short student exercise, based on the input grade, lesson & instructional materials. - `classic_use_case_generate_informative_articles` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate" button on the Write an informational text page, which generates text that describes the input topic, appropriate for the input grade level. - `classic_use_case_generate_lesson_plan` Classroom: User clicks "Generate lesson plan" button, which generates a lesson plan based on input grade, topic & instructional materials. - `classic_use_case_generate_presentation` Classroom: User clicks "Generate presentation outline" button, which generates a Slides presentation, based on input grade, topic & presentation length. - `classic_use_case_generate_project_activities` Classroom: User clicks on "Generate project" button, which generates several individual or group project ideas, based on the input grade, topic & instructional materials. - `classic_use_case_generate_vocab_list` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate" button on the Create a vocabulary list, which generates a list of vocabulary words & definitions, based on the input grade, topic & instructional materials. - `classic_use_case_meet_studio_lighting` Meet: Improves user's video in poor lighting conditions and allows users to use virtual light sources for more fine grained control. - `classic_use_case_meet_studio_look` Meet: Sharpens the user features when needed. - `classic_use_case_meet_studio_sound` Meet: Improves the audio quality when needed. Notably when using a Bluetooth narrowband microphone. - `classic_use_case_meet_take_notes_for_me_session` Meet: Generates a doc for meetings when Take notes for me feature was used. - `classic_use_case_relevel_content` Classroom: User clicks on the "Generate" button on the Re-level text page, which generates an updated version of their specified text, appropriate for the input grade. - `classic_use_case_sheets_turbofill` Sheets: User accepts a proactive suggestion to populate a column with text data based on another column in their table. - `classic_use_case_suggest_time_reporting` Gmail: User accepted a Gemini-generated suggestion for a time to offer when scheduling a meeting using "Help me schedule" while composing a mail. - `classic_use_case_teleprompter_word_match` Vids: Used for Recording Studio smart teleprompter, to match words from a script to a user's speech in real-time using a speech-to-text model. - `classic_use_case_translate_text` Classroom: User clicks on the "Translate" button on the Translate text page, which translates the input text into the selected language. - `condense`    - Gmail: Shortens draft's content when the user clicks "shorten" in the refinement menu.   - Slides: Corresponds to "Shorten" button in Help me Write entrypoint under textbox. Gemini returns a shortened version of the selected textbox.. - `conversation` A prompt is submitted to the Gemini side panel. This can be initiated by the user directly or by another feature on the user's behalf (e.g., an on-grid suggestion). - `custom_prompt` Slides: Corresponds to "Modify with a prompt" input in Help me Write entrypoint under textbox. Gemini returns a reworded version of the selected textbox according to the user's prompt. - `describe_gemini_uses`    - Chat: Describes Gemini uses in context in the sidepanel.   - Meet: "What can Gemini do in Google Meet" in Side Panel.   - Sheets: User asks Gemini to describe its capabilities or suggest ways to use the feature.. - `elaborate` Gmail: Expands draft's content when the user clicks "elaborate" in the refinement menu. - `formalize`    - Gmail: Formalizes content of the draft when user clicks "formalize" in the refinement menu.   - Slides: Corresponds to "More formal" button in Help me Write entrypoint under textbox. Gemini returns a reworded version of the selected textbox that's more formal in tone.. - `generate_ai_function_response` Sheets: Gemini generates content directly in a cell or range. This is triggered when a user manually enters the =AI() function or uses a feature that generates content on the grid on their behalf. - `generate_avatar_video` Vids: Generates a video of a digital avatar when a user provides a script and clicks "Generate" in the AI avatar sidebar. - `generate_document`    - Vids: Generates a Google Vid based on a prompt, any attached files, a generated outline and a supported template from the Getting Started dialog.   - Slides: Generates a Google Slides deck based on a prompt, and any provided sources and styles, from the Getting Started dialog.. - `generate_form` Forms: Generates a form based on user prompt; triggered when the user clicks "Create" in the "Help me create" dialog. The dialog is visible when creating a new form or alternatively when user clicks the "Help me create" button. - `generate_form_questions` Forms: Generates more questions for the existing form when "Suggest questions" button is clicked; the button is shown for unpublished forms, when it already has some content (non default title and 2 questions minimum). - `generate_image_for_current_page` Slides: No-prompt image generation for slides. User enters a prompt like "suggest an image for this slide". Gemini first generates the image prompt, and then uses it to generate images to return to the user. - `generate_images_in_product`    - Vids: Generates an image when a user enters a text prompt and clicks "Create" in the "Generate an image" sidebar.   - Meet: Triggers from side panel, user inputs text prompt and clicks on "Create Samples" button; Meet will use the input text prompt to generate a few images which the user can use as their visual background image.   - Slides: User clicks "Help Me Visualize" entry point in slides; Image Model returns the generated images to the user.. - `generate_nudge_prompts` Sheets: Gemini proactively suggests features or prompts for the user to try via on-grid suggestion. - `generate_starter_active_view` Gemini generates suggested starter prompts to users that utilizes active context. - `generate_starter_freeform` Generates response when starter tiles are clicked. - `generate_starter_tile_prompts` Gemini displays initial, semi-contextual starter prompts as tiles in the side panel to help users get started. - `generate_table_name` Sheets: Gemini automatically adds a table name (based on the table contents) for a newly converted table from a table conversion suggestion. - `generate_text` Gmail: Generates a smart draft when user clicks "create" on Help me write prompt input. - `generate_videos_in_product` Vids: Generates a video when a user enters a text prompt in the "AI video clip" sidebar. - `outpaint` Vids: Generates an expanded version of a selected image, extending beyond its original borders, when a user requests outpainting in their prompt and clicks "Create" in the "Generate an image" sidebar. - `paraphrase` Slides: Corresponds to "Rephrase" button in Help me Write entrypoint under textbox. Gemini returns the selected text reworded in a different way. - `proactive_suggestions` Generates text for proactive suggestion tiles based on context. - `proactive_suggestions_response` User selected a proactive suggestion to try in Gemini sidepanel and a response was generated. - `proofread` - `remove_background` Vids: Removes the background from a selected image, making it transparent, when a user clicks on the "Remove background" button in the image floating toolbar. - `replace_background` Vids: Replaces background for a selected image when a user provides a prompt describing the new background and clicks "Create" in the "Generate an image" sidebar. - `search_web` User searched the web using Gemini sidepanel. - `suggest_time` Calendar: Requested time suggestions for a meeting. - `summarize` Gemini summarizes current context. - `summarize_document_comment_thread` Summarize a comment thread in a document. - `summarize_drive_homepage_doclist_files` Shows a short file summary inline in the Drive Homepage file list. - `summarize_drive_homepage_doclist_files_long` Shows a longer file summary when user clicks on 'See Details' in the Drive Homepage file list. - `summarize_file` Chat: Generates a summary of a file in chat side panel when the user clicks the summarize button on a Drive file preview card in the chat UI. - `summarize_proactive` Gemini proactively generates and displays a summary of the detected active content when the side panel is opened. - `summarize_proactive_short` Gemini generates a short proactive summary or title for the user's content. - `user_confirmed_tools_operation` User clicks on buttons that come up in the sidepanel to confirm the operation during a conversation. | | `app_name` | `string`  Name of the Workspace application through which the action was performed. Possible values:   - `gemini_app` - `chat` - `classroom` - `docs` - `drive` - `gmail` - `keep` - `meet` - `sheets` - `slides` - `vids` | | `event_category` | `string`  Event Category Name indicates the type of the generative AI action. Possible values:   - `active_conversations` Represents a conversation with Gemini. - `active_generate` Represents Gemini’s generation capabilities - Example: GENERATE\_IMAGES or GENERATE\_SLIDES. - `active_summarize` Represents Gemini’s summarization capabilities Ex: SUMMARIZE\_THREAD. - `active_unspecified` Represents a category that is neither generate nor summarize. - `inactive` Represents a category where the user is not considered to be actively engaging with Gemini; that is not counted towards active usage. - `unknown` Represents a category that is not classified. | | `feature_source` | `string`  Identifies where a generative AI interaction originates within the user interface. Possible values:   - `ai_function` - `chat_with_gemini` - `classroom_gemini_education` - `drive_help_me_organize` - `enhanced_smart_fill` - `generate_background` - `help_me_refine` - `help_me_schedule` - `help_me_visualize` - `help_me_write` - `proofread` - `remove_image_background` - `search_ai_overview` - `side_panel` - `studio_light` - `studio_look` - `studio_sound` - `take_notes_for_me` - `workflows_creation` - `workflows_execution` | |
